title: Mallika Sagar straddles the worlds of art and sports auctions with equal ease
description: The first time Mallika Sagar conducted an auction was for Christie’s in New York, selling baseball memorabilia. She was just 25, and her trainer had warned her: “This is a room full of American men used to seeing American men [as auctioneers]. When they see you, a young Indian woman, just be ready, because I don’t think they are going to be ready,” recalls Sagar.The art history graduate knew little about baseball, but says the auction went off pretty well. In hindsight, it was prophetic, because Sagar, who specialises in Indian art and is an auctioneer with Pundole’s art gallery in Mumbai, has since broken ground as the first female sports auctioneer in India.She debuted in an Indian sports auction in 2021, as a reserve to Briton Hugh Edmeades, who had been conducting Indian Premier League (IPL) auctions since 2019. “It was the year of Covid, he needed a back-up in case he tested positive after landing in India, and reached out to me. Luckily, I didn’t need to step in as he was fine, but that year I was asked to do the Pro Kabaddi League (PKL),” says Sagar, recalling her route into sports auctioneering.In February 2023, she was called upon to conduct the auction for the inaugural season of the Women’s Premier League (WPL) and, end of that year, she took up her first IPL assignment—the mini-auction in Dubai. Last year, she conducted the Rugby Premier League auction on the request of actor Rahul Bose, the president of Rugby India and “an old friend”. This April, she hosted the auction for Season 2, where the women’s tournament was launched. “I am now down four auctions for WPL, three for IPL, five for kabaddi and two for rugby,” she says.Given her relatively recent, high-profile exposure as a sports auctioneer, it might be easy to overlook her training and experience with art. Her stint at Christie’s during her college years in the US gave her the chance to go through different departments within the company and gain an in-depth understanding of how an auction house works.Also Read: Ishita Moitra: Bringing contemporary female gaze into mainstream narrativesAfter her graduation, Christie’s called her back, but this time to work for them in New York, when they were moving offices from Park Avenue to the Rockefeller Center. “It was fantastic, I understood exactly what is needed at the back-end of an auction house,” she recalls.What also followed was formal training in the art and science of conducting live auctions. “There was an auctioneer training programme, which I attended every Friday. There was a trainer and a theatre coach, because you have to learn how to breathe and how to speak. And it’s all a bit of theatre and drama, because you’re up there for a few hours. It’s about not being nervous, the math, the numbers, how to balance different things,” she says.Back in India by end-2000, Sagar was doing between three and six charity art auctions a year, which were popular at the time as a way to raise donations for NGOs. It was in 2011 that she came back full-time to art, under Pundole’s umbrella, starting with two auctions a year and now conducting close to 10.As an auctioneer, Sagar explains, you should be able to sell any kind of art. “If you are in one of the larger auction houses internationally, you could be selling furniture one day, silver one day, art one day. I am lucky I’m a specialist today in the area that I also sell in—modern Indian contemporary paintings.”Auctioneers have the insights to know which paintings are going to do well, which are the rare ones. But although Sagar makes it sound like a cakewalk—”It’s a system: You have an estimate from the auctioneer’s book, you have a list of lot numbers, we go in the order of our catalogues, and you have the artist’s name, the title of the artwork, the estimate, the result”—reality can often throw curveballs. An auctioneer has to constantly read the room, keep the audience engaged and enthused, while encouraging the in-house team of experts handling bids coming through phone calls, the app and website, all while keeping an eye on the clock. W-Power List 2026 | Meet India's Top Self-Made Women of 2026But how different is it to auction artworks and sportspeople? “Anything to do with art or memorabilia, anything that’s not a human being essentially, is driven by passion,” says Sagar. “So, people spend maybe more than what the object may be worth on paper, sometimes a lot more and you have to run with that.”Art auctions can also be casual, given the familiarity she has with the audience and dealers. But sports auctions are a different ballgame. “I’m a lot more measured at a sports auction because the teams are serious and so, I’m not laughing and joking. It’s live on TV and with 10 million viewers, all of whom have an opinion. When you put yourself out in a public space with cricket, you’re really asking for trouble,” she now laughs. “I don’t have a thick skin. And when it first happened [social media trolling], I was in tears.” Sagar does clarify, though, that the criticism is perhaps not gendered, and maybe a male auctioneer would also face the same nitpicking.“Mallika is very professional and knows the business. She has a cool temperament and everything that an auctioneer needs. And she does prepare hard,” says Charu Sharma, TV presenter and founder of PKL, who is an auctioneer himself. “She has made a big difference in this field in India… you’ve got people here who are just as professional, just as good. I hope she is able to attract other women to also become auctioneers or become involved in sport with her calm, poise, professionalism, and not just the fact that there’s a lady there.”

title: Ishita Moitra: Bringing contemporary female gaze into mainstream narratives
description: There is a scene in almost every Ishita Moitra story where people take time to reveal who they really are. A woman says something honest over drinks. A family argument suddenly turns tender. A joke hides a heartbreak. A glamorous world exposes its hidden fragments.Across television, OTT and cinema, Moitra’s writing stands on these human contradictions. Her women are not perfect, rarely symbolic, and almost never written to fit stereotypes. They are ambitious and nurturing, insecure and self-aware, funny and vulnerable, often within the same scene.That sense of storyteller has made Moitra one of the most distinctive writing voices in the film industry. From Four More Shots Please! and The Test Case to Rocky Aur Rani Kii Prem Kahaani, her storytelling has consistently brought a contemporary female gaze into mainstream narratives without losing its spark.“The idea is to put forth real women and not the Madonna-whore complex,” Moitra says. “Women can be everything. One day you can actually be sacrificial, and the other day you can be ambitious, because that’s what real women are.”W-Power List 2026 | Meet India's Top Self-Made Women of 2026For filmmaker Karan Johar, who collaborated with Moitra on Rocky Aur Rani Kii Prem Kahaani (2023), her creative energy is unmistakable. “Ishita for me is a bona fide force of nature. She has an incredible sense of humour. She can bring pathos and humour to perfection… she creates a certain kind of magic in her writing, which I find very rare,” he tells Forbes India.Long before awards, film premieres and streaming success, Moitra discovered her writing skills through an essay competition in school. “During an essay competition in my 8th or 9th standard, the teacher was thrilled with what I wrote,” she recalls. “She read it out in front of the class. I realised that I love it [writing] and somehow it resonates with other people too.”That moment stayed with her. At a time when most career choices revolved around engineering or medicine, Moitra studied journalism at Delhi University before pursuing her master’s in mass communication at Jamia Millia Islamia. It was during those years that she realised fiction—and specifically screenwriting—was where she truly belonged.“That’s when I realised that what I wanted to do was write fiction… not novels, but writing for the big screen,” she says. “It was a journey that started at 13 and crystallised around 21.”Today, Moitra belongs to a generation of writers changing how women are written in Indian entertainment. Instead of presenting them through ideas of idealism, her characters exist in shades of grey, ambitious, insecure, loving, selfish, emotional and funny at once.That perspective has made her work resonate with the audiences, especially women who see themselves reflected in her characters. Moitra says much of her writing comes from observing people around her—friends, mothers, family conversations and everyday emotions. “I love going to family gatherings and hearing people talk,” she says. “Family gatherings are like gold mines for writers.”Along with her husband, filmmaker Neeraj Udhwani, Moitra co-created and co-produced Single Papa, a show exploring parenting and masculinity through a single father’s journey. This also marked a shift for her from being just a writer to co-creation and production. “When you are a writer otherwise, it’s like you’re just a teacher correcting papers,” she says with her characteristic humour. “Now [as a producer] I am the mother who is also the teacher.”Johar believes that emotional intelligence and shared cultural memory are central to Moitra’s voice as a writer. “I felt like we immediately connected as people, as friends and as collaborators,” he says. “Both of us have the same references from Hindi cinema. Both of us know the words of every single song that exists in the musicscape of Indian cinema.”Also Read: From small parts to centre stage, the rise of Chhaya KadamThat love for Hindi cinema runs deep for Moitra. “I’ve grown up watching masala Hindi films, and I love them. That is the film nutrition that I have been fed.”However, Moitra rejects the idea of writing differently for “mass” audiences. “I try to be authentic to the world of that story,” she says. “Sometimes when we start writing thinking what people expect from us, you can get a little muddled.”Motherhood has become one of the strongest anchors to shape Moitra’s perspective, changing the way she thinks about her work and legacy. “Whenever I do anything now, I think: Will my daughter like this? Is this something I want her to see and say, ‘My mama wrote this?’” she says. That grounding, she believes, becomes especially important in an industry dependent on constant validation. Family gives her perspective during both success and uncertainty.“Through my writing, I want to leave people with a smile on their faces and gratitude for relationships,” she says.

title: Video | Is the Skoda Enyaq vRS the ultimate one-car garage?
description:
Looking for the perfect blend of weekday skills and weekend thrills? This electric family SUV could be the answer

The perfect two-car garage. It’s a fantasy motoring enthusiasts have debated for decades.
Not familiar with the concept? It’s simple: if you had to choose two cars – one for everyday duties like commuting, the school run and shopping trips, and another purely for weekend B-road blasts – which would you choose? If you’re ever stuck for conversation with a fellow enthusiast, pose this question and watch the sparks fly.
But, alas, in today’s economic climate, the dream of running two cars – particularly when one is reserved almost entirely for Sundays – is becoming harder and harder to justify. And that means more and more drivers are starting to search for one car that’s capable of covering all bases: sensible when it needs to be, fun when it doesn’t.
Watch the video below as we explore whether the 335bhp all-electric Skoda Enyaq vRS really can deliver the best of both worlds.


Skoda Enyaq vRS: the electric family SUV that can do it all
There’s a particular genius to the vRS badge. Since the first Octavia vRS arrived in 2001, those three letters have stood for meaningful performance, real-world practicality and strong value. It’s the everyman performance car formula, refined over decades and now applied to Skoda’s electric family SUV flagship.
The Enyaq vRS continues that tradition with 335bhp, 697Nm and dual-motor all-wheel drive, delivering 0-62mph in 5.4 seconds. But it’s not just about straight-line pace. Dynamic Chassis Control, lowered suspension and revised steering calibration give it a level of composure and adjustability that no electric SUV this size has any right to, allowing it to switch between relaxed motorway cruiser and pulse-raising B-road blaster at the touch of a button.
Crucially, it remains an easy car to live with day to day. The 84kWh battery delivers up to 344 miles of range (WLTP), while 185kW DC charging enables a 10–80% top-up in around 26 minutes.
Inside, that signature vRS DNA injects sporty flair into an otherwise plush, minimalist cabin. There are vRS-specific sports seats, a bespoke sports steering wheel and contrast detailing. As you’d expect from a Škoda, equipment is generous, with a large 13in infotainment screen, augmented reality head-up display, heated seats and a 12-speaker CANTON sound system all included as standard. 
Practicality remains a core strength. A 585-litre boot, generous rear space and Skoda’s trademark ‘Smart, Spacious and Stylish’ touches – including an ice scraper in the tailgate and an umbrella in the door – ensure it can still deal with everything hectic family life throws at it without breaking a sweat. Maybe it’s time you try it for yourself.
Learn more about the Skoda Enyaq vRS

title: From small parts to centre stage, the rise of Chhaya Kadam
description: Chhaya Kadam finds it hard to erase 2001 from her memory. It was a year when she lost both her brother and father. “I felt as though my world had collapsed. I was confined to my home. I knew I should step out and carry on with life, but I was unable to get myself to do that,” says the actor who also underwent two knee surgeries after damaging a ligament the same year.Kadam, who had acted in a few plays in school, was not interested in taking to the stage in college. She had taken to kabaddi until her damaged knees meant she had to stop pursuing the sport. The tragedy in her family during the same period left her disillusioned and morose.It was around this time that she saw a newspaper advertisement about an acting workshop by theatre veteran Waman Kendre in Mumbai. Kadam believed it was a good opportunity to meet new people instead of spending time with relatives or friends, who, in all probability, would discuss the turmoil in her life. The course turned out to be a blessing for her.“I enjoyed the process… I got to learn a lot, and not just acting. It taught me to be independent and shaped me as a human. It made me understand that one does not become an actor merely by attending workshops or doing photo shoots. It erased all such assumptions. I realised I had to get better at many things—for instance, I didn’t read the newspapers, and I had language and diction issues because I hailed from Konkan. The workshop developed me in more ways than I could have imagined,” says Kadam, who has starred in acclaimed Marathi films like Sairat and Fandry, as well as recent noteworthy ones like the Hindi comedy-drama Laapataa Ladies, Sister Midnight and the Grand Prix (Cannes)-winning Malayalam film All We Imagine as Light.W-Power List 2026 | Meet India's Top Self-Made Women of 2026Kendre, who saw her from close quarters, describes her as a hardworking and passionate artiste. “It was evident that Chhaya would stand out. She had a lot of potential and was serious about her work. She is an honest actor,” the former director of the National School of Drama tells Forbes India. He adds that she trained for two-and-a-half months for his directorial venture and her first play, Zulwa, and ended up doing around 250 shows. That laid the foundation for her as an actor.As Kadam fell in love with acting during the workshop, she decided to pursue it as a profession. It was not easy, though, to make inroads for someone who did not come from a film family. Kadam’s father was a mill worker from Kalina, Mumbai, and her mother was a housewife. She was the youngest among five siblings—two brothers and three sisters.When the acting breaks did not come through, she took up smaller assignments such as working as an assistant for a Hindi serial. The hunt for proper parts continued. In fact, when she got to know that Doordarshan was making a short film, she approached the makers for a role. The director told her that casting was done and that they needed an assistant instead. She agreed, thinking it would help her make connections. The film was being shot in Baramati, Maharashtra, and as luck would have it, the role Kadam was vying for fell into her lap. The lady who was supposed to play the part did not turn up the day before her scene was scheduled to be filmed. The team asked Kadam to fill in, and she faced the camera for the first time—for Phatacha Pani (Marathi).“I struggled a lot in those five years after the workshop… in fact, I got my first play [Zulwa] in 2006. My family did not support me… they knew nothing about this industry or my battles. But all the obstacles that came my way during that phase made me stronger,” says Kadam. “I did everything with utmost sincerity and dedication. Even if I got one scene in a film, I accepted that and did justice to the part. But the industry is such that when you get work, it does not mean you have arrived. You have to keep looking for newer opportunities. And it is difficult to get those… it can take many years.”It indeed took a while for Kadam to stamp her authority with her performances. Today, the Madgaon Express actor is known for bringing authenticity to the characters she essays and for her nuanced approach to her craft. “With acting, you literally give birth to a person—their walk, mannerisms, body language, backstory, even if it’s a fictional character,” she explains. “I am an observant person. I study people. After I read what has been offered to me, I work on the small details and decorate the character.”Also Read: W-Power 2026: Why Huma Qureshi Chooses Reinvention Over ComfortTo play Suman Akka in Sairat, Kadam learnt Telugu from the camera crew on set, while in the case of Fandry, she took lessons in Kaikadi. “It is not enough to learn the lines. You need to know the language to understand the emotion,” she insists.According to Kendre, Kadam had an inferiority complex because of her economic status and language shortcomings. But she overcame those mental blocks and discovered herself as an actor and a human being. “Such a journey is rare. She has marched ahead confidently and has not looked back. I expect her to do a lot more,” he says.Achievements like going to Cannes for All We Imagine as Light are the icing on the cake for Kadam. She does not read too much into it though, saying it is in the past. “I like to live in the moment. I don’t think too far ahead. I just have to do good work,” says the actor, who likes to try various delicacies, travel to her native place in Konkan and spend time with the people closest to her.Conscious of the fact that she has to keep opening new doors for herself, Kadam appears unperturbed even if all this ends one day. “I came here with an empty bag. I have no fear about the bag being empty again,” she says.

title: CM Omar Abdullah: ‘We will continue striving to restore the historic Ashura procession’
ऑपरेशन सिंदूर में 6 जवान हुए थे शहीद, सरकार ने सार्वजनिक किए बहादुर जवानों के नाम
description:
Six soldiers were martyred in Operation Sindoor: केंद्र सरकार ने पहली बार ‘ऑपरेशन सिंदूर’ के दौरान देश के लिए शहीद हुए छह बहादुर सैनिकों के नाम आधिकारिक रूप से सार्वजनिक किए हैं। इन सभी जवानों के नाम नेशनल वॉर मेमोरियल की वेबसाइट पर मौजूद ‘रोल ऑफ ऑनर’ सूची में जोड़े गए हैं। यह सूची उन.
The post ऑपरेशन सिंदूर में 6 जवान हुए थे शहीद, सरकार ने सार्वजनिक किए बहादुर जवानों के नाम appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
Six soldiers were martyred in Operation Sindoor: केंद्र सरकार ने पहली बार ‘ऑपरेशन सिंदूर’ के दौरान देश के लिए शहीद हुए छह बहादुर सैनिकों के नाम आधिकारिक रूप से सार्वजनिक किए हैं। इन सभी जवानों के नाम नेशनल वॉर मेमोरियल की वेबसाइट पर मौजूद ‘रोल ऑफ ऑनर’ सूची में जोड़े गए हैं। यह सूची उन सैनिकों को समर्पित है, जिन्होंने देश की रक्षा करते हुए अपने प्राणों की आहुति दी।
ऑपरेशन सिंदूर में शहीद होने वाले छह वीर जवानों के सूबेदार मेजर पवन कुमार, रायफलमैन सुनील कुमार, लांस नायक दिनेश कुमार, एवी मूद मुरलीनायक, हवलदार सुनील कुमार सिंह और सुरेंद्र कुमार का नाम शामिल है। नेशनल वॉर मेमोरियल की वेबसाइट पर मौजूद ‘रोल ऑफ ऑनर’ सेक्शन में अब कुल 26,626 शहीदों के नाम दर्ज हैं। इस सूची में वर्ष 1947-48 के भारत-पाक युद्ध से लेकर ऑपरेशन सिंदूर तक देश के लिए सर्वोच्च बलिदान देने वाले सैनिकों के नाम शामिल हैं।
पहली बार मिली आधिकारिक पुष्टि
मई 2025 में भारत और पाकिस्तान के बीच चार दिनों तक चले सैन्य संघर्ष के दौरान कुछ भारतीय जवानों के शहीद होने की खबरें सामने आई थीं। हालांकि, उस समय सरकार ने किसी भी जवान की पहचान सार्वजनिक नहीं की थी। अब नेशनल वॉर मेमोरियल की वेबसाइट पर इन नामों के शामिल होने के बाद पहली बार आधिकारिक रूप से पुष्टि हुई है कि ऑपरेशन सिंदूर में छह सैनिकों ने देश के लिए सर्वोच्च बलिदान दिया।
पहलगाम आतंकी हमले के बाद शुरू हुआ था ऑपरेशन
‘ऑपरेशन सिंदूर’ की शुरुआत 7 मई 2025 को की गई थी। यह कार्रवाई 22 अप्रैल 2025 को जम्मू-कश्मीर के पहलगाम में हुए आतंकी हमले के जवाब में की गई थी। इस हमले में 26 निर्दोष लोगों, जिनमें अधिकांश पर्यटक थे, की मौत हो गई थी। हमले के जवाब में भारतीय सशस्त्र बलों ने पाकिस्तान और पाकिस्तान के कब्जे वाले कश्मीर (पीओके) में स्थित आतंकियों के 9 ठिकानों पर सटीक सैन्य कार्रवाई की थी। इस दौरान जैश-ए-मोहम्मद और लश्कर-ए-तैयबा जैसे आतंकी संगठनों के ठिकानों और उनके बुनियादी ढांचे को निशाना बनाया गया।
भारत और पाकिस्तान के बीच यह सैन्य संघर्ष लगभग चार दिनों तक चला। इसके बाद पाकिस्तान की पहल पर दोनों देशों ने 10 मई 2025 को सैन्य कार्रवाई रोकने पर सहमति जताई थी। अब नेशनल वॉर मेमोरियल की ‘रोल ऑफ ऑनर’ सूची में इन छह वीर जवानों के नाम शामिल होने के साथ ही ऑपरेशन सिंदूर में उनकी शहादत को आधिकारिक सम्मान दिया गया है।
The post ऑपरेशन सिंदूर में 6 जवान हुए थे शहीद, सरकार ने सार्वजनिक किए बहादुर जवानों के नाम appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.

title: Kasabian delay new album ‘Act III’ release and share G-Funk-inspired new single ‘Superpowers’ with Stephen Graham-starring trailer
description:
"We’ve had the album back on the operating table for a few final adjustments. We couldn’t send it out into the world without getting everything just right"
The post Kasabian delay new album ‘Act III’ release and share G-Funk-inspired new single ‘Superpowers’ with Stephen Graham-starring trailer appeared first on NME.
content:
Kasabian have delayed their new album ‘Act III’ and shared G-Funk-inspired new single ‘Superpowers’ – check it out below.

READ MORE: Serge Pizzorno on being fuelled by “imposter syndrome” and why new album ‘Act III’ is “all that’s great about Kasabian”

Their ninth studio LP was set to land on Friday July 17 but the band have now announced to their fans that it has been pushed back until September 4.
They wrote: “We’ve had the album back on the operating table for a few final adjustments. We couldn’t send it out into the world without getting everything just right, albums are forever! Trust us, it’ll be worth the wait.”
The band have also shared the latest taster from the record, ‘Superpowers’ which you can listen to below. Adolescence star Stephen Graham can also be seen reciting the lyrics from the song with Serge Pizzorno in a separate video, which you can also view below.



  










View this post on Instagram


























  










View this post on Instagram

























Speaking about working with Graham, Pizzorno said: “Audition tapes have always fascinated me. There’s something incredible about seeing a performance in its rawest form a behind the scenes glimpse into the craft of acting. I wanted to bring that feeling to life by turning the song’s lyrics into a script and presenting it as an audition tape.
“Getting to work with @stephengraham1973 one of Britain’s greatest actors, was a true honour. Watching him take the songs into a completely new space brought a whole new depth and meaning to the lyrics.”
Of the new track he added: “I remember hearing ‘Doggy Style’ by Snoop (Dogg) in my mate’s XR2, one of those tracks that makes you go ‘what?’ because you’ve never heard anything quite like it.
“When we recorded ‘Superpowers’ it was the first time I really felt like the sound that I could hear in my head, was what came out of the speakers.”
Kasabian CREDIT: Neil Bedford
Elsewhere, Pizzorno recently told NME the new album is “is all that’s great about Kasabian. It’s got Kasabian DNA running through it. It’s all the things that we’ve done in the past.”
Speaking about the track ‘Nothing Better Than This’, he added: “I just wanted to make something with that gnarly bass and you’d instantly know in four seconds, ‘That sounds like Kasabian’. I saw this meme of four upside-down bats that looked like goths dancing in a club. I wanted to make a song that they could dance to, so it’s got a weird goth edge to it.”
Meanwhile, Kasabian are due to play their biggest London headline show to date to 45,000 fans at Finsbury Park on July 4, and will also be the first ever Thursday night headliner at Leeds Festival this August.

They will also peform at Boardmasters, TRNSMT, Victorious Festival, Mad Cool, and more. Visit here for tickets and more information.

title: ‘Nothing Feels Exciting Anymore’: Gurgaon Techie Earning Rs 35 LPA Wonders If It’s Time To Quit Over Burnout

title: India vs Ireland 1st T20I, Belfast weather forecast: Rain threat looms over Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's likely India debut
description: India's T20I opener against Ireland in Belfast faces potential rain disruptions, though conditions are expected to clear by the evening's scheduled start. All eyes are on 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, who could debut after a stellar IPL season. This series also marks Shreyas Iyer's captaincy debut for India in the T20 format.
content: NEW DELHI: India's first T20I against Ireland at the Civil Service Cricket Ground in Stormont on Friday could be affected by the weather, with rain expected in Belfast during the day. The match marks the beginning of a new era under captain Shreyas Iyer, while 15-year-old batting sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi could make his much-awaited international debut. However, the weather may have a big say in how much cricket fans get to see.Will rain affect the India vs Ireland 1st T20I match?The forecast suggests there is a possibility of rain interruptions in Belfast.Hourly forecast (local time):9:00 AM: 16°C – 45% chance of rain10:00 AM: 17°C – 50%11:00 AM: 18°C – 55%12:00 PM: 19°C – 60%1:00 PM: 20°C – 65%2:00 PM: 21°C – 55%3:00 PM: 22°C – 45%4:00 PM: 22°C – 40%5:00 PM: 21°C – 35%6:00 PM: 20°C – 30%The first half of the day appears the most vulnerable to showers, raising the possibility of delays if rain lingers around Stormont.India vs Ireland 1st T20I: Good news for the scheduled startThere is some encouraging news for fans. Conditions are expected to improve by the evening, around the scheduled start of the match.At 6:00 PM local time, the forecast predicts:Temperature: 18°CConditions: Partly cloudyChance of rain: Just 4%Humidity: 83%Wind: 11 km/hVisibility: 7 kmIf the forecast holds, the teams could get close to a full match despite the threat of rain earlier in the day.All eyes on Vaibhav SooryavanshiApart from the weather, much of the attention will be on teenage batting prodigy Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, who is in line for a possible India debut after a stunning IPL 2026 season and impressive performances for India A.The youngster has created a selection headache for the team management, with India's top order already featuring established names like Abhishek Sharma, Sanju Samson and Ishan Kishan.The series will also mark Shreyas Iyer's first assignment as India's T20I captain after taking over from Suryakumar Yadav. 132010987India vs Ireland 1st T20I: Match timing and live streamingVenue: Civil Service Cricket Ground, Stormont, BelfastDate: Friday, June 26Match starts: 6:00 PM ISTLive TV: Sony Sports NetworkLive streaming: SonyLIV app and website

title: Operation Sindoor: ఆప‌రేష‌న్ సింధూర్‌లో ఆరుగురు సైనికులు వీర‌మ‌ర‌ణం.. తొలిసారి పేర్ల‌ను వెల్ల‌డించిన ప్ర‌భుత్వం
description: Operation Sindoor:  ఆప‌రేష‌న్ సింధూర్ వేళ ఆరుగురు భార‌తీయ సైనికులు వీర‌మ‌ర‌ణం పొందారు. అయితే ఆ అమ‌ర జ‌వాన్ల పేర్ల‌ను ఇవాళ కేంద్రం వెల్ల‌డించింది. ఆ సైనికుల పేర్ల‌ను ఢిల్లీలోని జాతీయ యుద్ధ స్మార‌కంలో రాయ‌నున్నారు. సుబేదార్ మేజ‌ర్ ప‌వ‌న్ కుమార్‌, రైఫిల్‌మాన్ సునిల్ కుమార్‌, లాన్స్ నాయ‌క్ దినేశ్ కుమార్‌, అగ్నీవీర్ ముర‌ళీ నాయ‌క్‌, హ‌విల్దార్ సునిల్ కుమార్ సింగ్‌,  సురేంద్ర కుమార్ .. ప్రాణాలు కోల్పోయిన‌వారిలో ఉన్నారు.
content:
న్యూఢిల్లీ: పాకిస్థాన్‌లో ఉగ్ర‌మూక‌ల్ని అంతం చేసేందుకు భార‌త సైన్యం గ‌త ఏడాది మే నెల‌లో ఆప‌రేష‌న్ సింధూర్(Operation Sindoor) చేప‌ట్టిన విష‌యం తెలిసిందే. పెహ‌ల్గామ్ ఉగ్ర‌దాడికి ప్ర‌తీకారంగా చేప‌ట్టిన ఆప‌రేష‌న్ సింధూర్‌లో ఆరుగురు భార‌తీయ సైనిక సిబ్బంది మృతిచెందిన‌ట్లు ఇవాళ ప్ర‌భుత్వం పేర్కొన్న‌ది. ఆ ఆప‌రేష‌న్‌లో వీర‌మ‌ర‌ణం పొందిన ఆ సైనికులు పేర్ల‌ను కూడా వెల్ల‌డించారు. దేశ రాజ‌ధానిలో ఉన్న జాతీయ యుద్ధ స్మార‌కంపై ఆ ఆరుగురు సైనికుల పేర్ల‌ను చేర్చ‌నున్న‌ట్లు సైన్యం తెలిపింది. మిలిట‌రీకి చెందిన సుబేదార్ మేజ‌ర్ ప‌వ‌న్ కుమార్‌, రైఫిల్‌మాన్ సునిల్ కుమార్‌, లాన్స్ నాయ‌క్ దినేశ్ కుమార్‌, అగ్నీవీర్ ముర‌ళీ నాయ‌క్‌, హ‌విల్దార్ సునిల్ కుమార్ సింగ్‌తో పాటు భార‌తీయ వైమానిక ద‌ళానికి చెందిన సురేంద్ర కుమార్ ఉన్నారు.
ఆప‌రేష‌న్ సింధూర్‌లో ప్రాణాలు కోల్పోయిన ఆరుగురు వీర సైనికుల‌తో పాటు 2025లో జ‌రిగిన వివిధ మిలిట‌రీ ఆప‌రేష‌న్స్‌లో అమ‌రులైన సైనికుల పేర్ల‌ను రిలీజ్ చేశారు. నేష‌న‌ల్ వార్ మెమోరియ‌ల్‌లో ఉన్న త్యాగ చ‌క్ర వ‌ద్ద ఆ ఆరుగురు సైనికుల పేర్ల‌ను రాయ‌నున్నారు. పాకిస్థాన్‌తో పాటు పాక్ ఆక్ర‌మిత క‌శ్మీర్‌లో ఉన్న ఉగ్ర‌వాద క్యాంపుల‌పై గ‌త ఏడాది మే 7వ తేదీన భార‌తీయ సైనిక ద‌ళాలు అటాక్ చేసిన విష‌యం తెలిసిందే. అయితే ఆప‌రేష‌న్ సింధూర్‌ను పాక్ తిప్పికొట్టే ప్ర‌య‌త్నం చేసింది. ఆ స‌మ‌యంలో డ్రోన్ దాడులు, షెల్లింగ్‌, వైమానిక అటాక్‌లు జ‌రిగాయి. రెండు దేశాల మ‌ధ్య నాలుగు రోజుల పాటు భీక‌ర ఘ‌ర్ష‌ణ జ‌రిగింది. ఆ త‌ర్వాత మే 10వ తేదీన వార్ ముగిసింది.

title: డంపింగ్ యార్డ్‌గా వల్లభరావు చెరువు కట్ట : దండంపల్లి సత్తయ్య
description: న‌ల్ల‌గొండ‌ పట్టణంలోని 17వ డివిజన్ పరిధిలో గల పద్మశాలి నగర్ దగ్గర ఉన్న వల్లభరావు చెరువు కట్ట వెంబడి చెత్తాచెదారం వేస్తూ డంపింగ్ యార్డ్ గా మారుతున్న పరిస్థితిని పరిశీలించి మున్సిపల్ అధికారులు వెంటనే శుభ్రం చేయించాలని సిపిఎం పట్టణ కార్యదర్శి దండంపల్లి సత్తయ్య డిమాండ్ చేశారు.
content:
నీల‌గిరి, జూన్ 26 : న‌ల్ల‌గొండ‌ పట్టణంలోని 17వ డివిజన్ పరిధిలో గల పద్మశాలి నగర్ దగ్గర ఉన్న వల్లభరావు చెరువు కట్ట వెంబడి చెత్తాచెదారం వేస్తూ డంపింగ్ యార్డ్ గా మారుతున్న పరిస్థితిని పరిశీలించి మున్సిపల్ అధికారులు వెంటనే శుభ్రం చేయించాలని సిపిఎం పట్టణ కార్యదర్శి దండంపల్లి సత్తయ్య డిమాండ్ చేశారు. శుక్రవారం సిపిఎం 17, 35 డివిజన్ శాఖ ఆధ్వర్యంలో చెరువు కట్టను పరిశీలించడం జరిగింది. ఈ సందర్భంగా సత్తయ్య మాట్లాడుతూ గత ప్రభుత్వం వల్లభ‌రావు చెరువును బతుకమ్మ కుంటగా మార్చి పద్మశాలి నగర్ నుండి అద్దంకి బైపాస్ వరకు కట్ట నిర్మాణం ఆధునీకరించి, సిసి రోడ్డు, లైట్లు వేసి మినీ ట్యాంక్ బండ్ గా పట్టణ ప్రజలకు ఆహ్లాద వాతావరణాన్ని సృష్టించడానికి తయారు చేయడం జరిగిందన్నారు. ప్రస్తుతం కట్టపై చెత్తాచెదారం వేస్తూ పాత బట్టలు, ఇల్లు కూల్చిన మట్టి తెచ్చి అక్కడ పోస్తున్నారని ఆవేదన వ్యక్తం చేశారు.
సాయంత్రం దోమల బెడదతో పద్మశాలి కాలనీవాసులు తీవ్ర ఇబ్బందులు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న‌ట్లు తెలిపారు. మందుబాబులు మధ్యాహ్నం నుండే ఆ కట్టపై కూర్చొని తాగుతున్నారని, మహిళలు బయటకు వెళ్లి రావాలంటే భయానక వాతావరణం ఉందన్నారు. మున్సిపల్ అధికారులు వెంటనే స్పందించి చెత్తా చెదారాన్ని తొలగించి ప్రజలు అక్కడ చెత్త వేయకుండా తగిన చర్యలు తీసుకోవాలని, పోలీసు వారు కట్టపై మద్యం తాగకుండా గస్తీ నిర్వహించాలని విజ్ఞప్తి చేశారు. ఈ కార్యక్రమంలో సిపిఎం 17, 35వ‌ వార్డు శాఖ కార్యదర్శి గంజి నాగరాజు, పట్టణ కమిటీ సభ్యురాలు దండెంపల్లి సరోజ, గంజి రాజేష్, కొత్తపల్లి హరీష్, దుడుగు భిక్షపతి, గంజి శంకరయ్య పాల్గొన్నారు.

title: CM Omar Abdullah joins Ashura mourners at Zadibal, serves water and milk at Sabeel
'എത്രയോ സീരിയലുകൾ ചെയ്തു, ഇപ്പോഴും സോഫി എന്നാണ് ആരാധകർ വിളിക്കാറ്'; മനസു തുറന്ന് ശ്രീകല
description: 'ഇപ്പോഴും പുറത്തു പോയാൽ എല്ലാവരും വിളിക്കുന്നത് സോഫി എന്നാണ്'.
content: <p>റേറ്റിംഗില്‍ എക്കാലത്തെയും ഹിറ്റായി മാറിയ പരമ്പരകളില്‍ ഒന്നായിരുന്നു ഏഷ്യാനെറ്റ് സംപ്രേഷണം ചെയ്ത 'എന്‍റെ മാനസപുത്രി'. 'സോഫി', 'ഗ്ലോറി' എന്നീ കഥാപാത്രങ്ങള്‍ വലിയ പ്രേക്ഷകശ്രദ്ധ നേടിയിരുന്നു. ശ്രീകല ശശിധരനായിരുന്നു സോഫിയെ അവിസ്മരണീയമാക്കിയത്. അഭിനയരംഗത്ത് ഇപ്പോള്‍ അത്ര സജീവമല്ലെങ്കിലും സോഷ്യല്‍മീഡിയയില്‍ സജീവമാണ് ശ്രീകല. ഇക്കഴിഞ്ഞ ദിവസം സീരീയൽ താരങ്ങളുടെ സംഘടനയായ ആത്മയുടെ ജനറൽ ബോഡി മീറ്റിങ്ങിൽ പങ്കെടുക്കാനും താരം എത്തിയിരുന്നു. ഈ വേദിയിലും സോഫിയെക്കുറിച്ചു തന്നെയാണ് മാധ്യമങ്ങൾ ശ്രീകലയോട് ചോദിച്ചതും.</p><p>''എത്രയോ സീരിയലുകൾ ചെയ്തു. പത്തു പതിനെട്ടു വർഷമായി ഈ ഫീൽഡിൽ. ഒരുപാട് സീരിയലുകൾ ചെയ്തെങ്കിലും ഇപ്പോഴും പുറത്തു പോയാൽ എല്ലാവരും വിളിക്കുന്നത് സോഫി എന്നാണ്. അത്രയും ജനങ്ങൾ അത് ഏറ്റെടുത്തു എന്നത് വലിയ കാര്യമാണ്. ആ സീരിയലിലെ എല്ലാ കാഥാപാത്രങ്ങൾക്കും അതിന്റേതായ പ്രാധാന്യം ഉണ്ടായിരുന്നു. തോബിയാസ് എന്ന വില്ലൻ കഥാപാത്രത്തിനായാൽ പോലും വലിയ പ്രധാന്യം ഉണ്ടായിരുന്നു ആ സീരിയലിൽ. ഇന്ന് ഇവിടെ വന്നപ്പോൾ അവരിൽ ചിലരെയൊക്കെ കണ്ടു. കുറേപ്പേരുടെ ഒപ്പം നിന്ന് ഫോട്ടോസ് എടുത്തു. എല്ലാവരെയും കണ്ടപ്പോൾ ഭയങ്കര സന്തോഷമായി. കൂടെ ഒരുമിച്ച് അഭിനയിച്ചവരെയൊക്കെ കുറേക്കാലത്തിനു ശേഷം കാണുന്നതാണ്. അതുകൊണ്ടു തന്നെ എല്ലാ മീറ്റിങ്ങുകൾക്കും മുടങ്ങാതെ വരാൻ ഞാൻ ശ്രമിക്കാറുണ്ട്'', ശ്രീകല പറ‍ഞ്ഞു.</p><p>സ്വഭാവസവിശേഷതകളാല്‍ തീര്‍ത്തും വ്യത്യസ്തമായ രണ്ട് പെണ്‍കുട്ടികളുടെ ജീവിതകഥ ഹൃദയസ്പര്‍ശിയായി അവതരിപ്പിച്ച പരമ്പരയായിരുന്നു എന്‍റെ മാനസപുത്രി. അതില്‍ സോഫിയോടൊപ്പമായിരുന്നു പ്രേക്ഷകരില്‍ ഭൂരിഭാഗവും. മാനസപുത്രിയിലെ സോഫിയായാണ് അറിയപ്പെടുന്നതെങ്കിലും അതുകൂടാതെ ഇരുപതിലധികം പരമ്പരകളിലും നിരവധി സിനിമകളിലും ശ്രീകല വേഷമിട്ടിട്ടുണ്ട്. കണ്ണൂർ സ്വദേശിയായ ശ്രീകല മികച്ചൊരു നർത്തകി കൂടിയാണ്.</p><p><span><strong>ഏഷ്യാനെറ്റ് ന്യൂസ് ലൈവ് കാണാന്‍ ഇവിടെ ക്ലിക് ചെയ്യുക</strong></span></p>

title: King and Queen will not live in Buckingham Palace after renovations
description: King Charles and Queen Camilla will continue to reside in Clarence House, Buckingham Palace says.

title: Ketan Agrawal Murder Case: केतन के पिता विशाल अग्रवाल से मिले CM फडवीस, उज्ज्वल निकम लड़ेंगे का केस
description: Ketan Agrawal Murder Case: केतन अग्रवाल के पिता विशाल अग्रवाल ने मुख्यमंत्री देवेंद्र फडणवीस से मुताकात की। सीएम ने सीनियर वकील उज्ज्वल निकम को विशेष सरकारी वकील नियुक्त करने के निर्देश दिए हैं।
content:
CM Fadnavis Met Ketan Agarwal Father: पुणे के लोहगढ़ में हुई केतन अग्रवाल की नृशंस हत्या के मामले में राज्य सरकार ने न्याय की प्रक्रिया तेज कर दी है। शुक्रवार को केतन पिता विशाल अग्रवाल ने मुख्यमंत्री देवेंद्र फडणवीस से मुलाकात की। इसके बाद सीएम फडणवीस ने केस को फास्ट-ट्रैक कोर्ट में भेजने और देश के दिग्गज वकील उज्ज्वल निकम को कमान सौंपने का बड़ा फैसला लिया है।
केतन अग्रवाल के पिता विशाल अग्रवाल ने आज पुणे में मुख्यमंत्री देवेंद्र फडणवीस से मुलाकात की और अपने बेटे के लिए न्याय की मांग की। मुख्यमंत्री ने उन्हें भरोसा दिलाया कि सरकार दोषियों को कड़ी सज़ा दिलाने के लिए प्रतिबद्ध है और परिवार को न्याय दिलाने में कोई कसर नहीं छोड़ी जाएगी।
उज्ज्वल निकम स्पेशल पब्लिक प्रॉसिक्यूटर नियुक्त
मुख्यमंत्री देवेंद्र फडणवीस ने तुरंत ही फ़ास्ट-ट्रैक कोर्ट बनाने और इस मामले के लिए उज्ज्वल निकम को स्पेशल पब्लिक प्रॉसिक्यूटर नियुक्त करने की मांग मान ली और लॉ एंड ज्यूडिशियरी डिपार्टमेंट के सेक्रेटरी को इसके लिए निर्देश जारी कर दिए। सीनियर वकील उज्ज्वल निकम ने भी इस मामले में स्पेशल पब्लिक प्रॉसिक्यूटर के तौर पर काम करने के लिए सहमति दे दी है।

लोणावळा ग्रामीण परिसरात झालेल्या केतन अग्रवाल यांच्या दुर्दैवी हत्येच्या प्रकरणात केतन अग्रवाल यांचे वडिल विशाल अग्रवाल यांनी आज पुण्यात मुख्यमंत्री देवेंद्र फडणवीस यांची भेट घेतली आणि आपल्या मुलाला न्याय मिळावा, अशी मागणी केली.
या प्रकरणातील दोषींना कठोर शिक्षा व्हावी, यासाठी… pic.twitter.com/JGAsQVCOvd
— CMO Maharashtra (@CMOMaharashtra) June 26, 2026

title: ଅତିରିକ୍ତ ତହସିଲଦାରଙ୍କୁ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ଉଦ୍ୟମ
description:
ରାଜନଗର,୨୬ା୬(ଭାସ୍କର ରାଉତରାୟ): ସମଗ୍ର ରାଜ୍ୟରେ କେଉଁଠି କେଉଁଠି ବେଆଇନ ବାଲି ଚାଲାଣକୁ ନେଇ ପୋଲିସ ପ୍ରଶାସନଙ୍କ ସହିତ ମାଫିଆଙ୍କର ମୁକାବିଲା ଏପରକି ଆକ୍ରମଣ ଭଳି ଅନେକ ଘଟଣା ସାମ୍ନାକୁ ଆସୁଛି। ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ରାଜନଗର ଭଳି ଶାନ୍ତିପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଜାଗାରେ ବାଲି ବୋଝେଇ ଟ୍ରକ୍‌କୁ ରାଜନଗର ହଂସୁଆ ପୋଲ ଉପରୁ ଅଟକାଇବା ସମୟରେ ରାଜନଗର ଅତିରିକ୍ତ ତହସିଲଦାରଙ୍କୁ ଆକ୍ରମଣର ଉଦ୍ୟମ ଘଟଣା ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ଆଲୋଡ଼ନ ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରିଛି। ଅତିରିକ୍ତ ତହସିଲଦାର ଆଶିଷ କୁମାର ଜେନା ରାଜନଗର ପୋଲିସ ଥାନାରେ […]
The post ଅତିରିକ୍ତ ତହସିଲଦାରଙ୍କୁ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ଉଦ୍ୟମ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ରାଜନଗର,୨୬ା୬(ଭାସ୍କର ରାଉତରାୟ): ସମଗ୍ର ରାଜ୍ୟରେ କେଉଁଠି କେଉଁଠି ବେଆଇନ ବାଲି ଚାଲାଣକୁ ନେଇ ପୋଲିସ ପ୍ରଶାସନଙ୍କ ସହିତ ମାଫିଆଙ୍କର ମୁକାବିଲା ଏପରକି ଆକ୍ରମଣ ଭଳି ଅନେକ ଘଟଣା ସାମ୍ନାକୁ ଆସୁଛି। ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ରାଜନଗର ଭଳି ଶାନ୍ତିପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଜାଗାରେ ବାଲି ବୋଝେଇ ଟ୍ରକ୍‌କୁ ରାଜନଗର ହଂସୁଆ ପୋଲ ଉପରୁ ଅଟକାଇବା ସମୟରେ ରାଜନଗର ଅତିରିକ୍ତ ତହସିଲଦାରଙ୍କୁ ଆକ୍ରମଣର ଉଦ୍ୟମ ଘଟଣା ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ଆଲୋଡ଼ନ ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରିଛି। ଅତିରିକ୍ତ ତହସିଲଦାର ଆଶିଷ କୁମାର ଜେନା ରାଜନଗର ପୋଲିସ ଥାନାରେ ଅଭିଯୋଗ କରିଛନ୍ତି।
ସୂଚନା ମୁତାବକ,  ଆଜି ସକାଳେ ଏକ ବାଲି ବୋଝେଇ ଟ୍ରକ ରାଜନଗର ହଂସୁଆ ସେତୁ ଉପରେ ଯାଉଥିବା ବେଳେ କୌଣସି ସୂତ୍ରରୁ ଖବର ପାଇ ଅତିରିକ୍ତ ତହସିଲଦାର ଜେନା ଖବର ପାଇ ଉକ୍ତ ଟ୍ରକକୁ ଅଟକାଇଥିଲେ। କିନ୍ତୁ ଟ୍ରକ୍‌ଟି ରାଜନଗର ଗୁପ୍ତି ରାସ୍ତାରେ ଦ୍ରୁତଗତି ଯାଇ କାଠୁଆଗଣ୍ଡ ଗାଁ ରାସ୍ତାକୁ ଚାଲି ଯାଇଥିଲେ। ପାଖାପାଖି ରାଜନଗରରୁ ୧୨ କିଲୋମିଟର ଦୂରକୁ ଚାଲିଯାଇଥିଲା। ଏହି ଟ୍ରକ୍‌କୁ ଅତିରିକ୍ତ ତହସିଲଦାର ପିଛା କରି କାଠୁଆଗଣ୍ଡ ଛକ ନିକଟରେ ଅଟକାଇଥିଲେ। ସେଠାରେ ଟ୍ରକ୍‌ରେ ଥିବା ଡ୍ରାଇଭର ଓ ଅନ୍ୟାନ୍ୟ ଅତିରିକ୍ତ ତହସିଲଦାରଙ୍କୁ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ଉଦ୍ୟମ କରିଥିଲେ। ଅତିରିକ୍ତ ତହସିଲଦାର ଜେନା ରାଜନଗର ପୋଲିସକୁ ଜଣାଇଥିଲେ। ପୋଲିସ ସେଠାରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିବା ପରେ ଡ୍ରାଇଭର ଫେରାର ହୋଇଯାଇଥିଲା। ପୋଲିସ ବାଲି ବୋଝେଇ ଟ୍ରକକୁ ଜବତ କରି ରାଜନଗର ଥାନାକୁ ଆଣିଥିଲେ। ପୋଲିସ ଜବତ ଟ୍ରକ୍‌ ଟିକେ କେଉଁ ଅଞ୍ଚଳର ? କେଉଁଠାକୁ ବାଲି ଯାଉଥିଲା ଏନେଇ ତଦନ୍ତ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିଛି।

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

The post ଅତିରିକ୍ତ ତହସିଲଦାରଙ୍କୁ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ଉଦ୍ୟମ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: King becomes first monarch to reveal tax bill as royal public funding to double to £100m
description: New figures show the monarch paid £12.9m in tax last year, but do not give any detailed breakdown of how that tax was calculated.

title: Investor Home Solutions Recognized as ‘Iconic Real Estate Consultant of the Year’ by ET Now Realty Awards 2026
description: The recognition as “Iconic Real Estate Consultant of the Year” reinforces Investor Home Solutions’ position as a leading real estate consultancy and highlights its contribution to the growth and transformation of India’s real estate sector.
content: Investor Home Solutions (IHS), a leading real estate consulting and advisory firm, has been honoured with the prestigious “Iconic Real Estate Consultant of the Year” award at the ET Now Realty Conclave & Awards 2026, held on Saturday at Taj Palace, New Delhi. The event is one of India’s most respected platforms recognizing excellence and innovation in the real estate industry. The award was received by Kanwar Pal Singh, Founder & CEO of Investor Home Solutions, whose visionary leadership, commitment to client success, and contribution to the real estate sector have helped establish the company as a trusted name among homebuyers and investors across India. The ET Now Realty Conclave & Awards brings together some of the most influential leaders, developers, consultants, investors, and policymakers from the real estate ecosystem. Receiving this recognition among the industry’s leading organizations is a significant milestone for Investor Home Solutions and reflects the company’s growing impact in the market. Speaking on the occasion, Kanwar Pal Singh, Founder & CEO, Investor Home Solutions, expressed his gratitude and said: “This award is not just a personal achievement but a recognition of the hard work, dedication, and passion of the entire Investor Home Solutions team. We are grateful to our clients, partners, and stakeholders who have trusted us throughout our journey. Our mission has always been to provide transparent, reliable, and result-oriented real estate solutions, and this recognition motivates us to continue raising industry standards.” Founded with a vision to simplify real estate investments and empower buyers with accurate market insights, Investor Home Solutions has emerged as a preferred real estate advisory partner for individuals, families, and investors seeking long-term value creation through property investments. The company has consistently focused on understanding customer needs and delivering personalized solutions that align with their financial goals and lifestyle aspirations. Over the years, Investor Home Solutions has built a strong reputation for its professional approach, market knowledge, ethical business practices, and customer-first philosophy. Through its dedicated team of real estate professionals, the company has successfully guided thousands of clients in making informed investment decisions across residential and commercial real estate segments. Under the leadership of Kanwar Pal Singh, Investor Home Solutions has witnessed remarkable growth and has expanded its presence across key real estate markets. The company’s success is driven by its ability to identify emerging opportunities, provide strategic investment guidance, and maintain a strong commitment to transparency and customer satisfaction. Investor Home Solutions believes that real estate is not just about buying and selling properties—it is about helping people build wealth, secure their future, and achieve their dreams. This philosophy has enabled the company to create long-term relationships with clients and earn their trust in an increasingly competitive marketplace. The recognition as “Iconic Real Estate Consultant of the Year” reinforces Investor Home Solutions’ position as a leading real estate consultancy and highlights its contribution to the growth and transformation of India’s real estate sector. As the industry continues to evolve, the company remains committed to leveraging technology, market intelligence, and customer-centric solutions to create exceptional value for its clients. With a clear vision for the future, Investor Home Solutions aims to further strengthen its market presence, expand its service offerings, and continue helping investors and homebuyers make smarter real estate decisions. About Investor Home Solutions (IHS) Investor Home Solutions (IHS) is a dynamic real estate consulting and advisory firm specializing in residential and commercial property solutions. The company offers end-to-end real estate services, including investment advisory, project marketing, property consulting, market research, and customer support. Led by Founder & CEO Kanwar Pal Singh, IHS is committed to delivering transparency, professionalism, and value-driven solutions that help clients achieve their real estate and investment objectives.(No ET Now Journalists are involved in creation of this article.)

title: NEET UG 2026 | నీట్ యూజీ 2026 రీ ఎగ్జామ్.. ఆన్సర్ కీ పేపర్ విడుదల.. ఎలా చూడాలంటే
description: NEET UG 2026 : నీట్ యూజీ 2026 రీ ఎగ్జామ్ గత ఆదివారం, జూన్ 21న జరిగిన సంగతి తెలిసిందే. ఈ పరీక్షకు సంబంధించిన ప్రొవిజినల్ ఆన్సర్ కీ గురువారం విడుదలైంది. ఈ విషయాన్ని పరీక్ష నిర్వహణా సంస్థ ఎన్‌టీయే (నేషనల్ టెస్టింగ్ ఏజెన్సీ) ప్రకటించింది.
content:
NEET UG 2026 : నీట్ యూజీ 2026 రీ ఎగ్జామ్ గత ఆదివారం, జూన్ 21న జరిగిన సంగతి తెలిసిందే. ఈ పరీక్షకు సంబంధించిన ప్రొవిజినల్ ఆన్సర్ కీ గురువారం విడుదలైంది. ఈ విషయాన్ని పరీక్ష నిర్వహణా సంస్థ ఎన్‌టీయే (నేషనల్ టెస్టింగ్ ఏజెన్సీ) ప్రకటించింది. పరీక్ష రాసిన అభ్యర్థులు ఆన్సర్ కీని సంస్థ అధికారిక వెబ్‌సైట్ neet.nta.nic.in ద్వారా డౌన్‌లోడ్ చేసుకోవచ్చు. అంతేకాదు.. ఈ కీ పేపర్‌పై అభ్యంతరాలుంటే తెలిపేందుకు అవకాశం ఉంది. విద్యార్థులు తమ అప్లికేషన్ నెంబర్, పాస్‌వర్డ్ ద్వారా లాగిన్ అవ్వాలి. ఈ నెల 28, రాత్రి 11.50 నిమిషాల వరకు ఈ ఆన్సర్ కీపై అభ్యంతరాలుంటే తెలపవచ్చు.
ఈ కీ పేపర్‌లో ఎలాంటి తప్పులు, అభ్యంతరాలున్నా ఈ సైట్‌ ద్వారా తెలపవచ్చు. ఇందుకోసం ప్రతి ప్రశ్నకు రూ.200 ఫీజు ఆన్‌లైన్ ద్వారా చెల్లించాలి. తమ అభ్యంతరాలను సమర్ధించే డాక్యుమెంట్లను కూడా సమర్పించాల్సి ఉంటుంది. అభ్యర్థులు తమ సందేహాలు, అభ్యంతరాల్ని ఒక్కసారి మాత్రమే సమర్పించాల్సి ఉంటుంది. ఒకసారి సబ్మిట్ చేసిన తర్వాత ఎడిట్ చేసే అవకాశం మాత్రం ఉండదు. అందుకే వాటిని ఆన్‌లైన్‌లో సమర్పించే ముందే సరి చూసుకోవాలి. సబ్జెక్ట్ నిపుణులు ఈ అభ్యంతరాలు, సూచనలను పరిశీలిస్తారు. అనంతరం వాటిని అంగీకరించి అవి సరైనవే అని నమ్మితే అభ్యర్థులు చెల్లించిన ఫీజును తిరిగి వాపస్ ఇస్తారు. విశ్లేషకుల అంచనా ప్రకారం.. నీట్ స్కోర్ ఆధారంగా సీట్ల కేటాయింపు ఇలా ఉండవచ్చు. 650-720 మార్కులు వస్తే ప్రభుత్వ ఎంబీబీఎస్ సీటు రావొచ్చు. 600-649 మార్కులు వస్తే ప్రభుత్వ మెడికల్ కాలేజీల్లో సీటు రావొచ్చు. 590-599 మధ్య మార్కులు వస్తే ఎంబీబీఎస్ సీటు వచ్చే అవకాశాలు ఎక్కువ. అయితే, ఇది రాష్ట్రాన్ని బట్టి, ఇతర రిజర్వేషన్లు వంటి అంశాలపై ఆధారపడి ఉంటుంది.
550-589 మార్కులు వస్తే ఎంబీబీఎస్‌లో పలు కాలేజీల్లో అవకాశం ఉంటుంది. ర్యాంకును బట్టి ఏదో ఒక కాలేజీలో సీటు రావొచ్చు. 550 మార్కులకంటే తక్కువ స్కోర్ వస్తే ప్రభుత్వ కాలేజీల్లో ఎంబీబీఎస్ సీటు వచ్చే అవకాశం తక్కువ. అయితే, ఇతర ప్రైవేటు కాలేజీల్లో మాత్రం అవకాశం ఉంటుంది. అలాగే, ఇతర మెడికల్ కోర్సులు చేయవచ్చు. అయితే, ఇవన్నీ గతంలో వచ్చిన మార్కుల ఆధారంగా వచ్చిన అంచనాలు మాత్రమే. ఏ ఏడాదికి ఆ ఏడాది స్కోర్లు మారుతుంటాయి. అప్పుడు వీటిలో మార్పులు ఉండే ఛాన్స్ ఉంది.

title: BOOTES Recognised as "Emerging Leader in Net-Zero Real Estate" at Times Now Real Estate & Infrastructure Summit
description: Over the years, BOOTES has established itself as a pioneer in sustainable engineering andconstruction through the successful execution of several landmark projects.
content: BOOTES, India's first Net-Zero Engineering Company, has been recognised as the"Emerging Leader in Net-Zero Real Estate" at the Times Now Real Estate & InfrastructureSummit, reaffirming its commitment to building future-ready developments that combinesustainability, engineering excellence, and long-term value creation.The recognition comes at a time when the real estate sector is witnessing a fundamental shift.As urbanisation accelerates and climate concerns intensify, sustainability is no longer a nicheconsideration, it is becoming a critical requirement for the future of residential, commercial, andpublic infrastructure development.According to the International Energy Agency (IEA), buildings account for nearly 30% of globalenergy consumption and a significant share of carbon emissions. As governments, businesses,and citizens move towards net-zero goals, the role of real estate in shaping a sustainable futurehas never been more important.Speaking on the recognition, Deepak Rai, Managing Director, BOOTES, said: "The future ofreal estate will be defined by performance, responsibility, and long-term impact. Net-zerodevelopment is no longer a concept for tomorrow—it is a necessity for today. This recognitionreinforces our belief that sustainability and economic growth can, and must, go hand in hand. AtBOOTES, we remain committed to creating infrastructure and living environments that areefficient, resilient, and future-ready."Over the years, BOOTES has established itself as a pioneer in sustainable engineering andconstruction through the successful execution of several landmark projects. The company hasdelivered the world's first Net-Zero Library, the world's first Net-Zero Museum, and theworld's first Net-Zero Capable Cold Storage, demonstrating its ability to translate ambitioussustainability goals into operational reality.BOOTES has also achieved recognition for delivering projects that meet some of the higheststandards of building efficiency, including receiving Asia's highest building efficiencycertification from IFC, World Bank, reinforcing its position as a leader in sustainableinfrastructure development.Building on its engineering and sustainability legacy, BOOTES has expanded its footprint in theresidential real estate sector through BOOTES Aspire Leisure Valley in Greater Noida West,BOOTES Aspire Silicon City in Noida, and BOOTES Heights in Alwar, while also preparingfor future developments in Aligarh, Vrindavan and Bengaluru.In Noida and Greater Noida, BOOTES is introducing its philosophy of Health-First Living- aresponse to the growing need for healthier urban environments. Through innovations such asNordic fresh air technology, intelligent ventilation systems, and homes engineered to achieveindoor AQI levels below 50, the company aims to redefine how quality of life is experiencedwithin residential communities.As India advances towards its net-zero ambitions and sustainable urban development goals,BOOTES continues to champion a model where engineering, sustainability, and humanwell-being work together to create the next generation of real estate.The Times Now recognition marks another milestone in BOOTES' journey to redefine howbuildings are designed, constructed, and experienced, creating developments that are not onlybuilt for today, but engineered for the future(No ET Now Journalists are involved in creation of this article.)

title: Amazon’s $48 billion India AI bet: Can it turn the country into an innovation hub? | ET NOW EXCLUSIVE
description: Amazon's $48 billion AI investment in India has sparked debate over whether the country will emerge as an AI innovation hub or remain a consumer market, with experts discussing jobs, startups and data sovereignty.
content: Amazon’s announcement of a $48 billion investment in India has sparked a larger conversation about the country’s future in artificial intelligence (AI). While the investment reflects growing confidence in India’s technology ecosystem, experts remain divided on a key question: Will India emerge as a global AI innovator or continue to be a vast market for foreign AI products?In a discussion featuring cybersecurity expert Amit Dubey, Mozilla Foundation Fellow Jeebo Elias, and AI scientist Dr. Utpal Chakraborty, the focus remained on employment, AI infrastructure, startups, data sovereignty and whether such investments can genuinely strengthen India's AI capabilities.   https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GHHBVYk9f4IA vote of confidence in India's AI talentAccording to Amit Dubey, Amazon’s investment signals that global technology companies are beginning to see India as more than just a consumer market.For years, India has largely relied on AI tools and large language models developed overseas. While Indian users and businesses have actively adopted these technologies, most of the value creation has remained outside the country.Dubey believes the latest investment reflects confidence in India's engineering talent and entrepreneurial ecosystem. He said it could create fresh opportunities for startups, developers and young professionals to participate in building AI products rather than merely using them.Infrastructure alone won't determine successJeebo Elias offered a more measured perspective, arguing that large investments should be evaluated beyond their headline figures.He pointed out that India has also committed to purchasing significant amounts of technology from the United States over the coming years, making it important to assess the overall balance of benefits.According to him, three factors continue to attract global AI companies to India:A massive and growing digital marketA highly skilled technology workforceStrong long-term growth potentialHowever, Elias questioned whether these investments are primarily aimed at building India's AI capabilities or simply expanding infrastructure that supports global companies' operations.Do data centres create enough jobs?One of the major concerns raised during the discussion was the employment potential of AI infrastructure projects.Elias noted that although data centres require workers during construction, permanent employment generated after operations begin remains relatively limited. He argued that large AI data centres employ only a small number of people once they become operational.He also highlighted that many states offer incentives such as subsidised land, electricity and tax benefits to attract these projects. While such incentives encourage investment, he believes policymakers should carefully assess whether the long-term economic returns justify these concessions.The bigger question: Will India build its own AI?For Elias, the real challenge is not attracting foreign investment but ensuring India develops its own AI ecosystem.He stressed that future leadership in AI will depend on who controls the underlying technology, infrastructure and platforms rather than simply who uses AI applications.Despite ongoing efforts to develop indigenous AI models, many Indian developers and businesses continue to depend heavily on global AI platforms. He believes future investments should help Indian researchers, entrepreneurs and students build competitive domestic AI models instead of increasing dependence on foreign technologies.Stronger data infrastructure could benefit IndiaAmit Dubey sees another significant advantage emerging from increased investments in AI infrastructure.He observed that for years, a large portion of India's data has been stored outside the country due to limited domestic infrastructure. Expanding local data centres could improve compliance with data protection regulations while allowing sensitive data to remain within India's borders.He added that India possesses one of the world's richest datasets across sectors such as healthcare, logistics and finance. If supported by domestic AI infrastructure, this data could become a major strength in developing home-grown AI solutions.State governments have an important roleDubey also believes state governments can play a much larger role in nurturing India's AI ecosystem.He suggested creating AI-focused technology zones, offering tax incentives, providing startups with access to GPUs, affordable computing infrastructure and subsidised data centres. Since developing advanced AI models requires enormous computing resources, reducing these costs could help more Indian startups compete globally.According to him, infrastructure investment is only the first step. Long-term success will depend on building an ecosystem that encourages innovation and commercialisation of AI technologies developed within India.Global companies and startups can grow togetherAI scientist Dr. Utpal Chakraborty presented a balanced outlook, saying the arrival of global technology companies should not be viewed as a threat to Indian startups.He explained that the AI ecosystem requires multiple layers, from foundational large language models to specialised small language models, AI agents and industry-specific applications. In such an ecosystem, multinational firms and startups can complement each other rather than compete directly.Chakraborty also pointed to the growing funding activity in India's startup ecosystem, noting that promising AI companies continue to attract investments and acquisitions. In his view, the increasing presence of global technology firms could accelerate the overall development of India's AI industry.

title: Chief Secretary | తెలంగాణ నూతన సీఎస్‌గా సంజయ్‌ జాజు నియామకం
description: Chief Secretary | తెలంగాణ నూతన చీఫ్‌ సెక్రటరీగా(సీఎస్‌) సంజయ్‌ జాజును( Sanjay Jaju) నియమిస్తూ ప్రభుత్వం శుక్రవారం ఉత్తర్వులు జారీ చేసింది.
content:
Chief Secretary | తెలంగాణ క్యాడర్‌ సీనియర్‌ ఐఏఎస్‌ అధికారి సంజయ్‌ జాజును( Sanjay Jaju) నూతన చీఫ్‌ సెక్రటరీగా(సీఎస్‌) నియమిస్తూ ప్రభుత్వం శుక్రవారం ఉత్తర్వులు జారీ చేసింది. కాగా, కేంద్ర సర్వీసుల్లో ఉన్న సంజయ్‌ జాజును కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వం మూడు రోజుల కిందనే రిలీవ్‌ చేసింది. ఆయనను కేంద్ర సర్వీసుల నుంచి రిలీవ్‌ చేస్తూ కేంద్ర అపాయింట్‌మెంట్స్‌ క్యాబినెట్‌ కమిటీ మంగళవారం ఉత్తర్వులు జారీచేసింది. తెలంగాణ ప్రభుత్వ విజ్ఞప్తి మేరకు సంజయ్‌ జాజును రిలీవ్‌ చేస్తున్నట్టు ఉత్తర్వుల్లో పేర్కొనడం గమనార్హం. ప్రస్తుత సీఎస్‌ రామకృష్ణారావు ఉద్యోగకాలం ఈ నెలాఖరుతో ముగియనున్న నేపథ్యంలో ఈ ఉత్తర్వులు వెలువడటం చర్చనీయాంశంగా మారింది.
1992 బ్యాచ్‌ తెలంగాణ క్యాడర్‌కు చెందిన సంజయ్‌ జాజు 12 ఏండ్లుగా కేంద్ర సర్వీసుల్లో కొనసాగుతున్నారు. 2014 అక్టోబర్‌ నుంచి ఇప్పటివరకు ఆయన కేంద్ర సర్వీసుల్లోనే ఉన్నారు. 2014 నుంచి 2018 వరకు నేషనల్‌ హైవేస్‌ అండ్‌ ఇన్‌ఫ్రాస్ట్రక్చర్‌ డెవలప్‌మెంట్‌ కార్పొరేషన్‌ లిమిటెడ్‌ డైరెక్టర్‌గా విధులు నిర్వర్తించారు. ఆ తర్వాత 20218-2023 వరకు భారత ప్రభుత్వ అదనపు కార్యదర్శిగా పనిచేశారు. ఆ తర్వాత కొంతకాలం సమాచార, ప్రసార మంత్రిత్వ శాఖ కార్యదర్శిగా పనిచేశారు. మొన్నటి వరకు నార్త్‌ ఈస్ట్‌ రీజియన్‌ డెవలప్‌మెంట్‌ మంత్రిత్వ శాఖ కార్యదర్శిగా పనిచేసిన విషయం తెలిసందే.

title: Crystal Palace set Lacroix price tag amid Chelsea talks
description: Crystal Palace will demand a fee of £50m for Maxence Lacroix, amid an approach from Chelsea.Chelsea have contacted their London rivals to discuss a deal for Lacroix, as Xabi Alonso looks to sign a ce...
content: Crystal Palace set Lacroix price tag amid Chelsea talksCrystal Palace will demand a fee of £50m for Maxence Lacroix, amid an approach from Chelsea.Chelsea have contacted their London rivals to discuss a deal for Lacroix, as Xabi Alonso looks to sign a centre-back this summer. The France international is one name on Chelsea’s radar, alongside Como defender Jacobo Ramon.Palace do not want to lose Lacroix this summer, having also sold Marc Guehi to Manchester City in January.However, Football Insider are reporting that the Eagles would be willing to discuss a deal fort he 26-year-old at £50m. Palace paid £18m to sign Lacroix from Wolfsburg in 2024 and that fee would represent a significant profit for the club’s sell-to-buy business model.Chadi Riad’s impressive performances at the World Cup offer encouragement that he can overcome the injury issues that have plagued his Palace career and impress next season.However, the South Londoners would seek a replacement for Lacroix before allowing him to leave, with another defender required to compete with Riad, Jaydee Canvot and Chris Richards for a place in the side.Read – World Cup Moments – Beckham red begins road to redemptionSee more – The Brazilian players to score in the first three games of a World CupFollow the Football Faithful on Social Media:Facebook | Instagram | Twitter | YouTube | TikTok

title: Sunderland striker Brobbey achieves rare World Cup feat
description: Brian Brobbey is having a World Cup to remember after a brilliant start to the 2026 tournament for The Netherlands.Brobbey started the Dutch’s opening game on the bench, but has took his chance sinc...
content: Sunderland striker Brobbey achieves rare World Cup featBrian Brobbey is having a World Cup to remember after a brilliant start to the 2026 tournament for The Netherlands.Brobbey started the Dutch’s opening game on the bench, but has took his chance since being called into the side by Ronald Koeman.The Sunderland striker scored twice as the Netherlands thrashed Sweden 5-1 in their second game, before finding the target again against Tunisia, as the Oranje sealed top spot in Group F.Brobbey has now scored three goals in just 154 minutes at the World Cup, having netted only once in 12 previous caps before the tournament.Incredibly, Opta have reported that Brobbey is only the third player on record (since 1966) to score with each of his first-ever three shots at the FIFA World Cup.Laszlo Kiss was the first to achieve the feat for Hungary in 1982, before Colombian centre-back Yerry Mina matched the achievement in 2018.The 24-year-old’s ruthless efficiency has given the Dutch a cutting edge.Read – World Cup Moments – Beckham red begins road to redemptionSee more – The Brazilian players to score in the first three games of a World CupFollow the Football Faithful on Social Media:Facebook | Instagram | Twitter | YouTube | TikTok

title: Palestra to undergo Chelsea medical today ahead of €55m move
description: Marco Palestra will undergo medical in London on Friday ahead of his transfer to Chelsea from Atalanta.Palestra will complete his medical examinations before penning a six-year contract at Chelsea, wi...
content: Palestra to undergo Chelsea medical today ahead of €55m moveMarco Palestra will undergo medical in London on Friday ahead of his transfer to Chelsea from Atalanta.Palestra will complete his medical examinations before penning a six-year contract at Chelsea, with an option to extend for a further season.Chelsea have agreed a €55m deal to sign Palestra, following a standout season in Serie A. The right-back spent the 2025/26 campaign on loan at Cagliari, where he was named Serie A’s Best Defender.Chelsea have beaten competition from Inter Milan and one unnamed Premier League side for Palestra, who made his debut for Italy in March.He’s set to become Xabi Alonso’s first major signing as Chelsea coach, following the appointment of the ex-Real Madrid manager.“I’m happy to join Chelsea. I’m so happy for this new chapter,” Palestra said ahead of the move.Read – World Cup Moments – Beckham red begins road to redemptionSee more – The Brazilian players to score in the first three games of a World CupFollow the Football Faithful on Social Media:Facebook | Instagram | Twitter | YouTube | TikTok

title: యువత మాదక ద్రవ్యాలకు దూరంగా ఉండాలి : ఎస్పీ అక్షాంశు యాదవ్
description: యువత మాదక ద్రవ్యాలకు దూరంగా ఉండాలని, ఆరోగ్యకరమైన జీవనశైలిని అలవర్చుకోవాలని, సమాజ అభివృద్ధిలో భాగస్వాములు కావాలని భువ‌న‌గిరి యాదాద్రి జిల్లా ఎస్పీ అక్షాంశు యాదవ్ అన్నారు. అంతర్జాతీయ మాదక ద్రవ్యాల దుర్వినియోగం, అక్రమ రవాణా వ్యతిరేక దినోత్సవం సందర్భంగా...
content:
భువనగిరి అర్బన్, జూన్ 26 : యువత మాదక ద్రవ్యాలకు దూరంగా ఉండాలని, ఆరోగ్యకరమైన జీవనశైలిని అలవర్చుకోవాలని, సమాజ అభివృద్ధిలో భాగస్వాములు కావాలని భువ‌న‌గిరి యాదాద్రి జిల్లా ఎస్పీ అక్షాంశు యాదవ్ అన్నారు. అంతర్జాతీయ మాదక ద్రవ్యాల దుర్వినియోగం, అక్రమ రవాణా వ్యతిరేక దినోత్సవం సందర్భంగా మాదక ద్రవ్యాల వల్ల కలిగే దుష్పరిణామాలపై ప్రజల్లో అవగాహన కల్పించడం, మత్తు పదార్థాల రహిత సమాజ నిర్మాణం లక్ష్యంగా భువనగిరి పోలీసుల ఆధ్వర్యంలో శుక్రవారం భువనగిరి పట్టణంలో 2 కే అవగాహన ర్యాలీని ఎస్పీ అక్షాంశు యాదవ్ ప్రారంభించారు. ఈ ర్యాలీ పాత బస్టాండ్ నుండి ప్రారంభమై వినాయక చౌరస్తా వరకు కొనసాగింది. విద్యార్థులు, ప్రజలు, పోలీసు అధికారులు, సిబ్బంది పెద్ద సంఖ్యలో పాల్గొని మత్తు పదార్థాలకు వ్యతిరేకంగా అవగాహన కల్పించారు.
ఈ సందర్భంగా ఎస్పీ మాట్లాడుతూ… మాదక ద్రవ్యాల అక్రమ రవాణా లేదా వినియోగానికి సంబంధించిన సమాచారం తెలిసిన వెంటనే పోలీసులకు తెలియజేయాలని ప్రజలకు పిలుపునిచ్చారు. యువత చెడు వ్యసనాలకు దూరంగా ఉండాలని చెప్పారు. సమాజంలో మాదక ద్రవ్యాల నిర్మాణంలో యువకులు ముందుండాలన్నారు. విద్యార్థి దశ నుండి సమాజంపై మంచి ఆలోచన పెట్టాలని, సమాజాన్ని బాగు చేయడంతో పాటు తన జీవితాన్ని, తన భవిష్యత్‌ను మంచి మార్గంలో నడుచుకోవాలన్నారు. ఈ కార్యక్రమంలో అదనపు ఎస్పీ లక్ష్మీనారాయణ, డీఎస్పీ రవీందర్, ట్రాఫిక్ డీఎస్పీ ప్రభాకర్ రెడ్డి, సీఐలు చంద్రబాబు, రమేష్, ప్రభాకర్ రెడ్డి, ఎస్ఐలు అనిల్ కుమార్, నరేష్, పోలీసు అధికారులు, విద్యార్థులు, ప్రజలు పాల్గొన్నారు.

title: 📲 Brazilian clubs condemn bomb threat in Ceará
description: Last Thursday (25), João Paulo Silva, president of Ceará, revealed that his daughter received a "bomb as a gift", along with a letter containing threats.After the case became public knowledge, sever...
content: 📲 Brazilian clubs condemn bomb threat in CearáLast Thursday (25), João Paulo Silva, president of Ceará, revealed that his daughter received a "bomb as a gift", along with a letter containing threats.After the case became public knowledge, several Brazilian clubs from different divisions of the national football pyramid issued statements condemning yet another episode of violence in the country.Unlike Série A, the second division of the Brasileirão did not pause for the 2026 FIFA World Cup.Last Saturday (20), Ceará lost 1-0 to Botafogo-SP at Estádio Presidente Vargas and dropped to 14th place in Série B with 17 points after 14 rounds.That same Thursday (25), Vozão announced the signing of Daniel Paulista as the team’s new head coach, replacing interim manager Anderson Batatais, who had taken charge after Mozart was dismissed on May 31. 📜 Read the statements of condemnation belowBotafogo statementBotafogo condemns the criminal acts committed against Ceará Sporting Club president João Paulo Silva and his family this Thursday (25).It is unacceptable for any football professional or their family members to be the target of threats, intimidation, or any kind of violence. Episodes like this, especially when they put the integrity and safety of innocent people at risk, are unjustifiable and must be fought with the utmost rigor.Botafogo stands in solidarity with João Paulo Silva and his family at this time, reiterating the importance of having the facts investigated by the proper authorities so that those responsible are identified and punished.This article was translated into English by Artificial Intelligence. You can read the original version in 🇧🇷 here.
