title: 'BJP Goons Assaulting Reporters, Protesters At Jantar Mantar': CJP Founder Abhij...
description: Cockroach Janta Party founder Abhijeet Dipke alleged BJP workers assaulted protesters and journalists at Jantar Mantar during his ongoing protest demanding Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan's resignation over alleged exam irregularities.
content: Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) founder Abhijeet Dipke on Friday (June 26) alleged that BJP workers physically assaulted reporters and protesters at Delhi's Jantar Mantar, where his sit-in protest over the NEET paper leak  and alleged exam irregularities entered its seventh day.Sharing videos on X, Dipke claimed the BJP 'goons' attacked journalists and demonstrators in the presence of Delhi Police. In one of the videos, a voice is heard saying, "Our members are getting hit in front of Delhi police." However, no visible assault can be seen in the footage. The claims and circumstances shown in the videos could not be independently verified.In another post, Dipke wrote, "Authorities have a problem with pillows too now. Wish they were this efficient and proactive on paper leaks."Earlier in the day, Dipke wished Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan's birthday by writing, "Happy Birthday, Pradhan. Please resign," on a whiteboard while supporters sang the birthday song.Addressing the minister in the video, he said, "A very happy birthday to you, Dharmendra Pradhan. Do us a favour and resign. As a birthday gift, we can even send you the resignation letter, you'll only have to put your thumb on it."Dipke has maintained that the protest will continue until Pradhan resigns. He also alleged that the Centre had not initiated talks with the protesters, claiming, "They are calling us terrorists instead."There was no immediate response from the BJP or Delhi Police to Dipke's allegations. (The Story Will be Updated With Reactions)The protest has drawn participation from students, NEET aspirants and members of Left student organisations, including the Students' Federation of India (SFI), All India Students' Association (AISA) and All India Students' Federation (AISF). The AISF has also set up a free library at the protest venue under its campaign, 'Fight for Education with Education'.

title: Samsung Galaxy S27 Pro Makes an Early Visit to the GSMA Database Alongside Galaxy S27 Plus, Galaxy S27 Ultra
description: Samsung's current flagship Galaxy S lineup includes three models
content: The Samsung Galaxy S27 series has been in the rumour mill recently. Following previous reports that a new Pro model could join the flagship lineup next year, fresh evidence corroborating the same has been discovered on a certification platform. Three unreleased Galaxy S27 series models have been sighted, including the purported Galaxy S27 Pro. The listing also mentions the Galaxy S27 Plus and Galaxy S27 Ultra, which are expected to be a part of the next-generation flagship Galaxy S lineup alongside the vanilla Galaxy S27.

title: পুখুৰীত সোমাল বিলাসী কিয়া বাহন : চালকৰ কৰুণ মৃত্যু
description:
ডিজিটেল সংবাদ, চিৰাং : চিৰাং জিলাৰ বাসুগাঁও চহৰৰ সমীপৰ কাকাৰাগাঁও-কামাৰডাঙ্গা গাঁৱত শুকুৰবাৰে পুৱাৰ ভাগত এক ভয়ংকৰ পথ দুৰ্ঘটনা সংঘটিত হয় । পুৱাৰ ভাগত স্থানীয় লোকে পথৰ দাঁতিত থকা পুখুৰীৰ পানীত ডুবি থকা অৱস্থাত এখনি বগা ৰঙৰ চাৰিচকীয়া বাহনৰ এটা অংশ প্ৰত্যক্ষ কৰে।
স্থানীয়ে লোকে বাহনখনৰ ভিতৰত কোনো লোক থাকিব পাৰে বুলি সন্দেহ কৰি বচোৱাৰ উদ্দেশ্যে পানীত সাঁতুৰি গৈ বাহনখনৰ ভিতৰত এজন লোকক মৃত অৱস্থাত প্ৰত্যক্ষ কৰে আৰু এই খবৰ বিয়পি পৰাৰ লগে লগেই এলেকাত তীব্ৰ চাঞ্চল্যৰ সৃষ্টি হয় । তাৰ পিছত গাঁওৰক্ষী বাহিনীৰ লোকে উক্ত পথ দুৰ্ঘটনা সন্দৰ্ভত ডাংতল আৰক্ষী চকীত অৱগত কৰে।
ইপিনে খবৰ লাভ কৰি ডাংতল আৰক্ষী চকীৰ পৰা আৰক্ষী আৰু এচডিআৰএফ বাহিনীৰ লোক দুৰ্ঘটনাস্থলীত উপস্থিত হৈ প্ৰথমে বাহনখনৰ ভিতৰত আবদ্ধ হৈ থকা চালকজনক মৃত অৱস্থাত বাহিৰত উলিয়াই আনে তাৰ পিছত দুৰ্ঘটনাগ্ৰস্থ বাহনখনক পানীৰ পৰা তুলি আনে । ইপিনে মৃত চালকজনৰ পকেটৰ পৰা উদ্ধাৰ হোৱা পৰিচয় পত্ৰ অনুসৰি মৃত চালকজনক গোৱালপাৰা জিলাৰ দুধনৈৰ ৯৯ নং তাৰাপাৰাৰ বাসিন্দা ৰবীন্দ্ৰ নাথ দত্তৰ পুত্ৰ হাৰাধন দত্ত বুলি চিনাক্ত কৰা হয়।
আৰক্ষীৰ সন্দেহ বাসুগাঁও চহৰৰ পৰা বঙাইগাঁও দিশে আহি থকা সময়ত এ এচ ১৯ ভি ৪৩৭৭ পঞ্জীয়নৰ তীব্ৰবেগী "কিয়া" বাহনখন নিয়ন্ত্ৰণ হেৰুৱাই পথৰ দাঁতিত থকা দ পানীৰ পুখুৰীত সোমাই পৰে ।  ফলত পুখুৰীৰ দ পানীত বুৰ যোৱা বাহনখনৰ ভিতৰত আবদ্ধ হৈ চালকজনে কৰুণ মৃত্যুক সাৱতি লয়। আৰক্ষীৰ লোকে চালকজনৰ মৃতদেহ মৰণোত্তৰ পৰীক্ষাৰ বাবে কাজলগাঁৱৰ জেএচবি অসামৰিক চিকিৎসালয়ত প্ৰেৰণ কৰিছে।

title: ती ४ किलो वजनाची चांदीची वीट नेमकी कुठे गेली? तिचा हिशोब कुठे? संजय राऊतांकडून सवाल उपस्थित, चौकशीची मागणी
description: मुंबई | Mumbaiअयोध्या राम मंदिरातील दानातील चोरी प्रकरणात कायदेशीर कारवाई सुरू झाली आहे. एसआयटीचा प्राथमिक तपास अहवाल मिळाल्यानंतर, रामजन्मभूमी पोलीस ठाण्यात आठ आरोपींविरुद्ध गुन्हा दाखल करण्यात आला आहे. अयोध्यातील श्रीराम जन्मभूमी तीर्थ क्षेत्र ट्रस्टने गुन्हा दाखल केल्यानंतर, आठ जणांना आरोपी बनवण्यात आलेय. ट्रस्टचे सदस्य कृष्ण मोहन यांनी एसआयटीच्या प्राथमिक अहवालाच्या आधारे ही तक्रार केलीय. दुसरीकडे […]
content:
मुंबई | Mumbaiअयोध्या राम मंदिरातील दानातील चोरी प्रकरणात कायदेशीर कारवाई सुरू झाली आहे. एसआयटीचा प्राथमिक तपास अहवाल मिळाल्यानंतर, रामजन्मभूमी पोलीस ठाण्यात आठ आरोपींविरुद्ध गुन्हा दाखल करण्यात आला आहे. अयोध्यातील श्रीराम जन्मभूमी तीर्थ क्षेत्र ट्रस्टने गुन्हा दाखल केल्यानंतर, आठ जणांना आरोपी बनवण्यात आलेय. ट्रस्टचे सदस्य कृष्ण मोहन यांनी एसआयटीच्या प्राथमिक अहवालाच्या आधारे ही तक्रार केलीय. दुसरीकडे याच मुद्यावरून शिवसेना ठाकरे गटाचे खासदार संजय राऊत यांनी निशाना साधत काही गंभीर आरोप केले आहे.



संजय राऊतांचा खळबळजन दावा‘अयोध्या येथील राम मंदिराच्या उभारणीसाठी शिवसेना ठाकरे गटाने दान केलेली ४ किलो वजनाची चांदीची वीट बेपत्ता झाल्यामुळे गंभीर प्रश्न निर्माण झाले आहेत. उद्धव ठाकरे यांनी हजारो शिवसैनिक आणि साधू-संतांच्या उपस्थितीत १ कोटी रुपये आणि ही पवित्र चांदीची वीट सढळ हाताने दान केली होती. तरीही, इतकी वर्षे उलटूनही ट्रस्टकडून त्याबाबत कोणतीही पावती किंवा माहिती मिळालेली नाही. ती वीट नक्की कुठे गेली? आता सखोल चौकशी आणि जबाबदारी निश्चित करण्याची वेळ आली आहे!’ असे म्हणत खासदार संजय राऊत यांनी मंदिराच्या कार्यप्रणालीवर प्रश्नचिन्ह उपस्थित केले आहे.



राऊत यांनी पोस्टमध्ये प्रश्न उपस्थित करत, “ती 4 किलो चांदीची वीट नेमकी कुठे गेली? तिचा हिशोब कुठे आहे? या संपूर्ण प्रकरणाची सखोल चौकशी होऊन जबाबदारी निश्चित झाली पाहिजे,” अशी मागणी केली आहे.




“Serious questions over the missing 4 kg silver brick donated by Shiv Sena for the Ram Mandir construction in Ayodhya.Uddhav Thackeray ji had generously contributed ₹1 crore + this sacred silver brick in the presence of thousands of Shiv Sainiks & saints. Yet, years later, no… pic.twitter.com/fy1HoTTg3n— Sanjay Raut (@rautsanjay61) June 26, 2026




संजय राऊत यांच्या या पोस्टनंतर राजकीय वर्तुळात नव्या चर्चेला उधाण आले आहे. राम मंदिरासाठी देण्यात आलेल्या देणग्यांच्या पारदर्शकतेचा मुद्दा पुन्हा ऐरणीवर आला आहे.



आठ जणांवर गुन्हा दाखलराम जन्मभूमी ट्रस्टचे सदस्य श्रीकृष्ण मोहन यांच्या तक्रारीच्या आधारे, राम मंदिरातील दानाच्या चोरीप्रकरणी टिन्नू यादव, अनुकल्प मिश्रा, लवकुश मिश्रा, अविनाश शुक्ला, सुभाष चंद्र शुक्ला, करुणेश पांडे, मनीष यादव आणि रामशंकर मिश्रा यांच्या विरोधात नावे नमूद करून एफआयआर दाखल करण्यात आला आहे. त्यांच्यावर भारतीय दंड संहितेच्या कलम ३०६, ३१६, ३१७, ३१७(४), ३१७(५), ६१, ३(५) आणि भ्रष्टाचार प्रतिबंधक कायद्यांतर्गत (पीसी कायदा) आरोप ठेवण्यात आले आहेत.



हे आरोप सार्वजनिक झाल्यानंतर राजकीय वर्तुळात चर्चा झाली आणि विरोधी पक्षांनी या प्रकरणाची निष्पक्ष चौकशी करण्याची मागणी केली. त्यानंतर, समाजवादी पक्षाचे अध्यक्ष अखिलेश यादव यांनीही सोशल मीडियाद्वारे या प्रकरणावर प्रतिक्रिया दिली आणि पारदर्शकता निश्चित करण्यावर भर दिला.



दरम्यान, वाढत्या वादाच्या पार्श्वभूमीवर, उत्तर प्रदेशचे मुख्यमंत्री योगी आदित्यनाथ यांनी संपूर्ण प्रकरण गांभीर्याने घेतल असून चौकशीचे आदेश दिले. १३ जून रोजी, त्यांनी लखनौचे विभागीय आयुक्त डॉ. विजय विश्वास पंत यांच्या नेतृत्वाखाली तीन सदस्यीय विशेष तपास पथक (एसआयटी) स्थापन केले आणि त्याला मुदतीत सविस्तर अहवाल सादर करण्याचे निर्देश दिले.

title: Murder arrest as girl, 3, found dead
description: A man was taken to hospital with a serious injury and will be in custody once treated, say police.

title: Drone Attack: ଇରାନର ଡ୍ରୋନ୍‌ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ପରେ ହର୍ମୁଜରେ ଜାତିସଂଘ ବନ୍ଦ କଲା ଉଦ୍ଧାର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ
description:
ତେହେରାନ: ହର୍ମୁଜ୍ ପ୍ରଣାଳୀରେ ଡ୍ରୋନ୍ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ପରେ ପୁଣି ଥରେ ଉତ୍ତେଜନା ବୃଦ୍ଧି ପାଇଛି। ଜାତିସଂଘର ଏକ ଦଳ ଏହି ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟରେ ନିୟୋଜିତ ରହିଥିବା ସମୟରେ ଇରାନ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଏହି ଆକ୍ରମଣ ହୋଇଛି। ଓମାନ ଉପକୂଳରେ ଏକ ମାଲବାହୀ ଜାହାଜ ଉପରେ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ପରେ, ଜାତିସଂଘର ସାମୁଦ୍ରିକ ସଂସ୍ଥା, ଅନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ସାମୁଦ୍ରିକ ସଂଗଠନ (ଆଇଏମ୍‌ଓ) ଉଦ୍ଧାର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକୁ ସ୍ଥଗିତ ରଖିଛି। ଆଇଏମ୍‌ଓର ନିଷ୍ପତ୍ତି ପାରସ୍ୟ ଉପସାଗରରେ ଫସି ରହିଥିବା ଜାହାଜରେ ପ୍ରାୟ ୧୧,୦୦୦ ନାବିକଙ୍କ ସୁରକ୍ଷା ଉପରେ ଗମ୍ଭୀର ପ୍ରଶ୍ନ ଉଠାଇଛି।
ଅପରେସନ ଆରମ୍ଭ
ଗତ କିଛି ଦିନ ହେଲା ଜାତିସଂଘ ଓମାନ ଓ ଅନ୍ୟ କେତେକ ସଦସ୍ୟ ଦେଶମାନଙ୍କ ସାହାଯ୍ୟରେ ପାରସ୍ୟ ଉପସାଗରରେ ଫସି ରହିଥିବା ଜାହାଜକୁ ସୁରକ୍ଷିତ ଭାବେ ବାହାର କରିବାକୁ ଅପରେସନ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିଥିଲା। ଯୁଦ୍ଧ ଓ ସୁରକ୍ଷା କଟକଣା ଯୋଗୁଁ ଦୀର୍ଘ ଦିନ ଧରି ଫସି ରହିଥିବା ଜାହାଜଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ହର୍ମୁଜ୍ ପ୍ରଣାଳୀ ପାର କରିବାରେ ସାହାଯ୍ୟ କରିବା ଏହି ମିଶନର ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ ଥିଲା। କିନ୍ତୁ ଓମାନ ଉପକୂଳରେ ସିଙ୍ଗାପୁର ପତାକା ବହନ କରୁଥିବା ମାଲବାହୀ ଜାହାଜ ‘ଏଭର ଲଭଲି’ ଉପରେ ଗୁରୁବାର ଆକ୍ରମଣ ପରେ ଆଇଏମ୍‌ଓ ଏହାର ଉଦ୍ଧାର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ବନ୍ଦ ରଖିଛି। ଏହି ଆକ୍ରମଣରେ କୌଣସି ନାବିକଙ୍କ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ହୋଇ ନଥିଲେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଜାହାଜ କ୍ଷତିଗ୍ରସ୍ତ ହୋଇଥିଲା। ଫଳରେ ଆଇଏମ୍‌ଓ ସୁରକ୍ଷା କାରଣର ଦ୍ବାହି ଦେଇ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ଅସ୍ଥାୟୀ ଭାବେ ବନ୍ଦ ରଖିଛି। ଆଇଏମ୍‌ଓ ମହାସଚିବ ଆର୍ସେନିଓ ଡୋମିଙ୍ଗୁଏଜ୍ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ, ଉଦ୍ଧାର କରାଯିବା ତାଲିକାରେ ଥିବା ଜାହାଜଗୁଡ଼ିକର ସୁରକ୍ଷା ସୁନିଶ୍ଚିତ ନହେବା ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଅଭିଯାନ ଆଗକୁ ବଢ଼ିବ ନାହିଁ। ତେବେ ଗୁରୁବାର ଆକ୍ରମଣର ଶିକାର ଜାହାଜ ଜାତିସଂଘର ଉଦ୍ଧାର ମିଶନର ଅଂଶ ନଥିଲା। ଏହି ଘଟଣା ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ କରିଛି ଯେ, ସମୁଦ୍ର ପଥ ଏପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ସୁରକ୍ଷିତ ନୁହେଁ। ଆଇଏମ୍‌ଓ କହିଛି ଯେ, ଏହି ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ପାଖାପାଖି ୨୦,୦୦୦ ନାବିକ ପୃଥକ୍‌ ପୃଥକ୍‌ ଜାହାଜରେ ଫସି ରହିଛନ୍ତି। ଏମାନଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ୧୧,୦୦୦ ନାବିକଙ୍କୁ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କରିବାକୁ ସ୍ବତନ୍ତ୍ର ଯୋଜନା କରାଯାଇଥିଲା। ଏବେ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ବନ୍ଦ ରଖାଯାଇଥିବାବେଳେ ନାବିକମାନେ ମଝି ସମୁଦ୍ରରେ ଫସି ରହିଛନ୍ତି। ସୂଚନାଯୋଗ୍ୟ, ଗତ ସପ୍ତାହରେ ୧୨୫ଟି ଜାହାଜ ହର୍ମୁଜ ପାର୍‌ କରିଥିଲା।
Uttarakhand: ଉତ୍ତରାଖଣ୍ଡରେ ନିହାଙ୍ଗ ଶିଖ୍‌ଙ୍କ ବିରୋଧ ଥମିଲା: ଡେରାଡୁନ୍‌ ସ୍ଥିତି ସ୍ବାଭାବିକ

title: World Cup: ରାଉଣ୍ଡ ୩୨କୁ ନେଦରଲାଣ୍ଡ୍‌ସ, ଜାପାନ, ସ୍ବିଡେନ୍‌ର ଯୋଗ୍ୟତା
description:
ଡାଲାସ୍‌: ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ଚଳିତ ବିଶ୍ବକପ୍‌ର ଗ୍ରୁପ୍‌-ଏଫ୍‌ରୁ ନକ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌ ସ୍ଥାନ ପକ୍କା ହୋଇଛି। ନେଦରଲାଣ୍ଡ୍‌ସ (୭ ପଏଣ୍ଟ୍‌) ଗ୍ରୁପ୍‌ ଟପର୍‌ ଏବଂ ଜାପାନ (୫ ପଏଣ୍ଟ୍‌) ଦ୍ବିତୀୟ ଏବଂ ସ୍ବିଡେନ୍‌ (୪ ପଏଣ୍ଟ୍‌) ତୃତୀୟ ଦଳ ଭାବେ ରାଉଣ୍ଡ-୩୨କୁ ଯୋଗ୍ୟତା ଅର୍ଜନ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ଭୋର୍‌ରେ ସମନ୍ତାରାଳ ଭାବେ ଏହି ଗ୍ରୁପ୍‌ର ଖେଳାଯାଇଥିବା ଦୁଇଟି ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ରୁ ଗୋଟିଏ ଫଳାଫଳ ବାହାରିଥିଲା ବେଳେ ଅନ୍ୟଟି ଅମୀମାଂସିତ ରହିଥିଲା। କନ୍‌ସାସ୍‌ ଷ୍ଟାଡିୟମ୍‌ରେ ନେଦରଲାଣ୍ଡ୍‌ସ ୩-୧ ଗୋଲ୍‌ରେ ଟ୍ୟୁନିସିଆକୁ ପରାସ୍ତ କରିଥିଲା ବେଳେ ଡାଲାସ୍‌ ଷ୍ଟାଡିୟମ୍‌ରେ ଖେଳାଯାଇଥିବା ସ୍ବିଡେନ୍‌ ଓ ଜାପାନ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ୧-୧ ଗୋଲ୍‌ରେ ଅମୀମାଂସିତ ରହିଥିଲା।
ଟ୍ୟୁନିସିଆର ହ୍ୟାଟ୍ରିକ୍‌ ପରାଜୟ
କନାସ୍‌ ଷ୍ଟାଡିୟମ୍‌ରେ ଟ୍ୟୁନିସିଆର ଭୁଲ୍‌ ପାଇଁ ତୃତୀୟ ମିନିଟ୍‌ରେ ନେଦରଲାଣ୍ଡ୍‌ସ ପ୍ରାରମ୍ଭିକ ଅଗ୍ରଣୀ ନେଇଥିଲା। ଟ୍ୟୁନିସିଆର ଏଲିୟସ୍‌ ସିଖିର (୩ ମିନିଟ୍‌)ଙ୍କ ଆତ୍ମଘାତୀ ଦଳକୁ ପଛରେ ପକାଇଥିଲା। ଏହାର ୪ ମିନିଟ୍‌ ପରେ ଭିର୍ଗିଲ ଭାନ୍‌ ଡିକ୍‌ଙ୍କ ଏକ ସୁନ୍ଦର ପାସ୍‌କୁ ବ୍ରାଏନ୍‌ ବ୍ରବି (୭ ମିନିଟ୍‌) ଗୋଲ୍‌ ଦେଇ ନେଦରଲାଣ୍ଡ୍‌ସକୁ ୨-୦ରେ ଆଗୁଆ କରିଥିଲେ। ଏହାପରେ ଆଉ ଗୋଲ୍‌ ନ ହେବାରୁ ପ୍ରଥମାର୍ଦ୍ଧ ୨-୦ରେ ନେଦରଲାଣ୍ଡ୍‌ସ ପକ୍ଷରେ ରହିଥିଲା। ଦ୍ବିତୀୟାର୍ଦ୍ଧର ନବମ ମିନିଟ୍‌ରେ ଟ୍ୟୁନିସିଆ ଗୋଟିଏ ଗୋଲ୍‌ ଶୁଝି ଦେଇଥିଲା। ହାନିବାଲ ମେଜ୍‌ବ୍ରିଙ୍କ ପାସ୍‌ରେ ହାଜାମ ମସୌରି ଏହି ଗୋଲ୍‌ ଦେଇଥିଲେ। ୬୪ତମ ମିନିଟ୍‌ରେ ନେଦରଲାଣ୍ଡ୍‌ସର ଜାନ୍‌ ପୌଲ ଭାନ୍‌ ହେକେ ଦଳ ପାଇଁ ତୃତୀୟ ଗୋଲ୍‌ ସ୍କୋର୍‌ କରିଥିଲେ। ଏହି ଗୋଲ୍‌ରେ ତିଜାନି ରାଇଜେଣ୍ଡର୍ସ ସହାୟତା କରିଥିଲେ। ଶେ‌ଷ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଆଉ ଗୋଲ୍‌ ନ ହେବାରୁ ନେଦରଲାଣ୍ଡ୍‌ସ ୩-୧ରେ ବିଜୟ ବାନା ଉଡ଼ାଇଥିଲ। ଅନ୍ୟପକ୍ଷରେ ଟ୍ୟୁନିସିଆ ହ୍ୟାଟ୍ରିକ୍‌ ପରାଜୟ ସହ ଗ୍ରୁପ୍‌ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟରୁ ବିଦାୟ ନେଇଥିଲା।
India-Ireland 1st T20: ଭାରତ-ଆୟର୍ଲାଣ୍ଡ ପ୍ରଥମ ଟ୍ବେଣ୍ଟି-୨୦ ଆଜି: ବୈଭବଙ୍କ ଉପରେ ନଜର
ପଏଣ୍ଟ ବାଣ୍ଟିଲେ ଜାପାନ-ସ୍ବିଡେନ
ନିଜ ନିଜର ଶେଷ ଗ୍ରୁପ୍‌ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ରେ ଜାପାନ ଓ ସ୍ବିଡେନ୍‌ ପଏଣ୍ଟ ବାଣ୍ଟିଛନ୍ତି। କଡ଼ା ସଂଘର୍ଷପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଏହି ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ର ପ୍ରଥମାର୍ଦ୍ଧ ଗୋଲ୍‌ଶୂନ୍ୟରେ ଶେଷ ହୋଇଥିଲା। ଦ୍ବିତୀୟାର୍ଦ୍ଧ ଆରମ୍ଭରୁ ରିତ୍‌ସୁ ଡୁଆନଙ୍କ ପାସ୍‌ରେ ଡାଇଜେନ୍‌ ମାଏଦା (୫୬ ମିନିଟ୍‌) ଗୋଲ୍‌ ଦେଇ ଜାପାନକୁ ଆଗୁଆ କରିଥିଲେ। ଜାପାନର ଏହି ଖୁସି ବେଶି ସମୟ ରହି ନଥିଲା। ଏହାର ୬ ମିନିଟ୍‌ ପରେ ସ୍ବିଡେନ୍‌ ଗୋଲ୍‌ଟି ଶୁଝି ସ୍ଥିତି ବରାବର କରି ଦେଇଥିଲା। ଭିକ୍ଟୋର ୟୋ‌କେରେସ୍‌ଙ୍କ ସହାୟତାରେ ଆନ୍ଥୋନି ଏଲାଙ୍ଗା (୬୨ ମିନିଟ୍‌) ଏହି ଗୋଲ୍‌ଟି ଦେଇଥିଲେ। ଶେଷ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ କେହି କାହାରିକୁ ଗୋଲ୍‌ ଦେବାକୁ ସକ୍ଷମ ନ ହେବାରୁ ମ୍ୟାଚ୍‌ ୧-୧ରେ ଅମୀମାଂସିତ ରହିଥିଲା। ଏହି ଅମୀମାଂସିତ ସହ ଜାପାନ ଲଗାତାର ତୃତୀୟ ଥର ଲାଗି ବିଶ୍ବକପ୍‌ର ନକ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌ ସ୍ଥାନ ପକ୍କା କରିଥିଲା। ସେହିପରି ୨୦୧୮ ପରେ ସ୍ବିଡେନ୍‌ ନକ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌ରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିଥିଲା। ୨୦୧୮ରେ କ୍ବାର୍ଟରଫାଇନାଲ୍‌ ଖେଳିଥିବା ସ୍ବିଡେନ୍‌ ୨୦୨୨ରେ ନକ୍‌ଆଉଟ୍‌ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ବିଦାୟ ନେଇଥିଲା।

title: How Were Funds Stolen From Ram Temple? Inside The Alleged Donation Theft
description: To investigate, hidden cameras were installed, revealing employees manipulating cash. One would obstruct visible cameras while another concealed stolen notes. Cash was miscounted, allowing employees to siphon funds undetected.
content: In the last week of May, officials associated with the Ram Temple Trust reviewed the amount being deposited in the bank and examined the daily process of emptying the donation boxes. Some members of the Trust became suspicious about some irregularities in the funds. Normally, each donation box contains around Rs 6–7 lakh when the box is opened.However, over the course of a few weeks, officials noticed that bundles of ₹500 notes were consistently falling short.As suspicion deepened, hidden cameras were installed by some trust members inside the room where the cash was counted. Footage recorded over the following week allegedly revealed that while one employee would deliberately stand in front of the visible CCTV cameras, another employee would remove notes from the bundles and conceal them inside his clothes.Although their actions were hidden from the regular CCTV cameras, they were captured by the hidden cameras.As per sources, the theft was also carried out through another method.Employees responsible for counting the cash would deliberately insert extra notes into each bundle. When the cash reached the bank, officials would count only the number of bundles instead of recounting every individual note, and a voucher would be prepared accordingly.During the transfer of cash from the temple to the bank, the extra notes that had been inserted into the bundles were allegedly removed.This ensured that the amount matched the voucher while allowing cash to be siphoned off.8 people under scannerAnukalp Mishra, who was associated with preparing donation vouchers, allegedly carried out this manipulation with the help of his brother-in-law, Lavkush Mishra. After the matter came to light, police reportedly recovered lakhs of money from Lav Kush Mishra's residence.According to the sources, all employees involved in the cash-counting process had been appointed through personal recommendations or acquaintances.For example, Tinnu Yadav, the driver of Champat Rai, was working as a manager and had allegedly arranged for his cousin, Manish Yadav, to join the cash-counting team.Similarly, Anukalp Mishra, who had been working there for years, allegedly got his brother-in-law, Lavkush Mishra, employed in the same process.A major lapse was that employees were not searched while leaving after their shifts.This allegedly allowed them to gradually steal cash from the very room where donation boxes were opened, notes were sorted, and bundles were prepared.After reviewing CCTV footage of Avinash Pandey, investigators allegedly found that the money he was seen stealing corresponded with deposits made into the bank on the same dates.During questioning, Trust officials matched these transactions and reportedly confirmed that Avinash had deposited a portion of the allegedly stolen donation money into his personal bank account.Investigators found that the theft allegedly took place before the counting of cash and before the donation boxes were officially opened. The Uttar Pradesh Police on Thursday arrested all eight accused in the case. An FIR has been registered, and investigators are trying to determine whether more people were involved in the alleged fraud and if the embezzlement was part of a larger organised racket. Further investigation is underway.

title: NTA’s Early Answer Key Release Raises Expectations for Faster NEET UG 2026 Resul...
description: The NTA recently released the provisional answer key for Re-NEET, prompting medical aspirants to expect a quicker announcement of the NEET UG 2026 results. Read on to check the expected release date.
content: Just four days after Re-NEET, the National Testing Agency (NTA) released the provisional answer key, an aberration from the timeline the testing agency has followed for years. Owing to this, medical aspirants are now anticipating an expedited release of the NEET UG 2026 results.Speaking about the Re-NEET 2026 result announcement, NTA Director General Abhishek Singh had earlier told Times Now Digital, "Let NTA start the evaluation process, then NTA will give a date. We did this re-exam in 37 days, so we compressed the whole exam cycle. So, results would also be processed faster than one would expect."Gap Between NEET UG 2026 Provisional Answer Key and Result DateCheck out how much time NTA has taken to announce results after releasing the provisional answer key in the past three years:NEET 2025: Provisional key – June 3 | Result – June 14 | Gap: 11 daysNEET 2024: Provisional key – May 29 | Result – June 4 | Gap: 6 daysNEET 2023: Provisional key – June 4 | Result – June 15 | Gap: 11 daysAverage gap (2023–2025): 9 daysAccording to previous year trends, the NEET UG 2026 result is expected within 9–10 days after the provisional answer key release.NEET 2026 Final Answer Key to be IssuedAlong with the results, the board releases the revised answer key. It is considered final and cannot be challenged further.Currently, the answer key objection window for Re-NEET is open. Candidates who find discrepancies in the official answer key can challenge it by providing valid arguments, attaching supporting documents, and paying the required objection fee of Rs 200 until June 28, 2026.The subject experts will then review the objections raised by candidates. If any objection is found valid, a final answer key will be issued, based on which the Re-NEET 2026 result will be declared.

title: ED Raids Fuel Fresh Corruption Charges Against Karnataka Govt - BJP Claims 'Orga...
description: BJP leader R Ashoka has launched a fresh attack on the DK Shivakumar-led Congress government, alleging that ED raids exposed an 'organised syndicate' in Karnataka's Excise Department.
content: BJP leader and Leader of the Opposition in the Karnataka Assembly R Ashoka has launched a sharp attack on the DK Shivakumar-led Congress government, alleging that the Enforcement Directorate's recent raids had exposed an "organised syndicate" operating within the state's Excise Department.  Related News | Not A Technical Fault: BMRCL Reveals What Caused Bengaluru Purple Line Delay—It Was A Metal ChainIn a post on social media, Ashoka accused the Shivakumar government of presiding over rampant corruption and claimed that nearly every department had become a centre of graft since the Congress came to power in Karnataka."There is no end to the Congress government's loot, there is no end to the chain of scams!"A scandal every day, a naked glimpse of loot every day! Since the @INCKarnataka government came to power in Karnataka, every department has become a hotbed of corruption.  Related News | Bengaluru Footpath Crackdown From July 1: Encroachments To Be Removed Across 2,000 Km Of Roads"As revealed in a press report, the Enforcement Directorate (ED) has unearthed the fact that the Congress government is leading an "organized syndicate" in the Excise Department just to collect bribes!"This is not just corruption, it is a systematic robbery going on with the blessings of influential people in the government!"Ashoka then went on to reveal the "naked truths" in the excise scam. He claimed that black money and gold worth ₹13.3 crore had been recovered from Belagavi Division Additional Commissioner YD Manjunath and his associates. He further alleged that investigators had seized a "secret book" containing records of bribe collections, including details of who paid the money and where it was allegedly routed. He also accused officials of obtaining benami bar licences in the names of family members and close associates, claiming that the practice had compromised the integrity of the licensing system.  Related News | Bengaluru Traffic Alert: Muharram Procession to Affect Key Routes on Saturday; Check Diversions"Naked truths revealed in the Excise Scam: The Minister's close ties: Public Works Minister Satish Jarkiholi's own brother, Belagavi Division Additional Commissioner YD, Black money and gold worth ₹13.3 crore have been recovered from Manjunath and his associates!"The ‘master book’ of bribery accounts: How much has been collected from whom? To whom has that money reached? The ‘secret bribery book’ with every inch of information has now reached the hands of ED officials!"Benami bar license scam: Officials themselves are getting benami licenses in the names of their family members and close friends and are swallowing the entire system."  Related News | 450 Days Of Protest, 4,500 Objections: JDS' Kumaraswamy Accepts Debate On Bidadi Township ProjectAshoka then said that ED officials had conducted simultaneous searches at 14 locations across Karnataka as part of the probe, exposing what he described as a large-scale scam within the Excise Department. "ED officials have simultaneously raided 14 important places in the state and exposed the color of this cosmic scam."Targeting Chief Minister Shivakumar, Ashoka questioned how deep the alleged corruption network extended within the government. "CM @DKShivakumar If you see that the families of influential ministers in your cabinet are leading this cosmic bribery avatar, it becomes clear how far the roots of this collection scam have gone."- Did you also get your share of the money recorded in this ‘secret book’?- Did the money from the monthly commission scam reach the Delhi High Command?- Who is the real father of this organized syndicate that is soaked in the blood of the people of the state?"  Related News | Actor Krishi Thapanda’s Friend Found Dead in Her Apartment in BengaluruCalling for a thorough probe, the BJP leader demanded that the case be handed over to the CBI or to a judicial commission headed by a High Court judge. "How long will you remain silent even though the loot of one department after another of your government is being exposed? The people of Karnataka will never forgive your commission rule. This scam should be immediately handed over to a judicial investigation led by a High Court judge or the CBI, and those who have tarnished the ministerial post should be punished. #CongressLootsKarnataka"The Karnataka government has not immediately responded to Ashoka's latest allegations.

title: 'Too Late Now,' Siya Claims Ketan Said To Her, 'Didn't Want To Marry'
description: Siya Goyal now claims she told Ketan Agrawal she didn't want to marry him and that he refused to end the engagement, but police say chats recovered from their phones show no sign of this and instead reveal an affectionate, normal couple.
content: Pune: In a fresh twist in the Lohagad Fort murder case, accused Siya Goyal has reportedly given investigators a new version of events, one that police sources say doesn't match the evidence on her own phone.According to Lonavala Police sources, Siya told investigators during questioning that she had informed Ketan Agrawal she did not want to marry  him, and that Ketan had responded saying it was "too late now," and that everything had gone too far, so nothing could be changed.But that account is running into trouble. Police sources said investigators have seized both Siya's and Ketan's mobile phones, and the chats recovered from them appear to tell a very different story, one of affectionate, ordinary conversations between a couple preparing for their wedding, with no sign of the resistance or conflict Siya has now described.That mismatch, sources say, has left police unconvinced by her latest claim at this stage of the investigation. Officers are continuing to examine the case from multiple angles, cross-referencing statements against digital evidence as the probe progresses.  3 Failed Attempts, A Lost Passport And The Final PushThe development adds to an already complex picture in a case where police allege Siya and her co-accused, Chetan Chaudhary, made four attempts to kill Ketan before succeeding on 18 June, and where the two are now also reportedly blaming each other over who delivered the fatal push at the fort.The first attempt was allegedly made on 31 May, when Siya took Ketan to the fort intending to push him from a deserted point and pass it off as an accidental fall during a trek. According to police sources, Siya later told investigators she chose Lohagad specifically because the isolated spot made it easy to disguise a fatal fall as a trekking accident, exploiting Ketan's own love for trekking as the lure.That plan failed, and Siya and Chetan allegedly regrouped on 1 June to draw up what they considered a "foolproof" second attempt for 4 June. That collapsed too, partly because of an upcoming Bali trip scheduled for 6 June. Police sources say Chetan had been pressuring Siya to keep Ketan away from that trip, and under that pressure, Siya allegedly tore up Ketan's passport and flushed it  down a hotel washroom en route to the airport on 6 June, using a missing-phone excuse to create a window to destroy the document. The Bali trip was cancelled, and Ketan, suspicious that the passport hadn't simply gone missing, reportedly got into repeated arguments with Siya in the days that followed.A third attempt followed on 14 June, when Siya again took Ketan to the fort, but the push failed after he got caught in a bush. When confronted, she allegedly claimed she had pushed him because she'd spotted a snake.It was this third failure, sources say, that pushed Chetan past his limit. He is alleged to have told Siya: "Ab naya plan 18 tareekh ka hai... Ketan ko main maarunga, tumse nahi ho payega" (the new plan is for the 18th... I'll kill Ketan, you won't be able to do it). For the first three attempts, Chetan had reportedly stayed away from the fort altogether; for 18 June, he decided to go to Lohagad himself for the first time and carry out the murder personally.

title: Are You An Indian? The Passport That Doesn't Settle The Question
description: The government's clarification that a passport is not conclusive proof of citizenship has left many Indians asking a simple question: if not a passport, then what is?
content: For most Indians, the passport has always felt like the gold standard. It is the document we guard most carefully. It gets stored inside lockers and is treated with far more respect than most government papers. It even survives floods in plastic folders. After all, it is issued only after thorough, multi-level checks... our documents are scrutinised, our addresses verified and the process culminates in a police verification at our doorstep. In other words, a passport is issued only after multiple layers of due diligence.So when the government recently 'reminded' us that it is merely a travel document and not conclusive proof of Indian citizenship, it left many asking a simple question: If not a passport, then what exactly proves that I am an Indian citizen?The irony is hard to miss. The same passport is accepted almost everywhere else. Want a driving licence? Passport works. Opening a bank account? Passport works. Applying for a PAN card? Passport works. Getting a gas connection? Passport works. It sits among the highest-value documents recognised by the government itself. That is what has made this debate so confusing. Open the first page of an Indian passport and it carries the words "By Order of the President of the Republic of India". For most citizens, that has always felt like the state's ultimate endorsement of who they are. The blue cover tells the world you are Indian... just apparently not conclusively to India. The government's answer is rooted in law. It says citizenship and passports are governed by two different legislations. Citizenship is determined under the Citizenship Act, while passports  are issued under the Passports Act. In other words, a passport allows you to travel internationally, but if your citizenship is ever challenged in a court of law, the passport alone cannot settle that question.Legally, there is logic to this position. The Passports Act gives authorities the power to refuse a passport if an applicant is not an Indian citizen. At the same time, another provision allows the government, in exceptional public interest situations, to issue travel documents aka passport to certain categories of non-citizens, such as stateless persons or other exceptional cases. Because this exception exists, the government argues that a passport cannot be treated as conclusive proof of citizenship.  That explanation may satisfy lawyers. It has left many ordinary Indians bewildered.Because in everyday life, the passport enjoys a status few other documents do. It is accepted to open bank accounts, obtain driving licences, apply for PAN cards and complete countless official formalities. It tells foreign governments that you are Indian. Yet, if your citizenship itself is questioned, it suddenly becomes insufficient.This debate also revives memories of moments when citizenship became a source of anxiety. During the NRC exercise in Assam, thousands struggled to establish their citizenship despite possessing multiple government documents. More recently, during SIR, documentation once again became a contentious issue. These episodes exposed an uncomfortable truth: India has plenty of identity documents, but no single citizenship document.When Aadhaar was introduced, it was seen as the one document that would simplify identity in India. Today, Aadhaar enrolment and updates happen at banks, post offices and authorised centres across the country and it is seen as a document that's easily attainable. The government has also repeatedly clarified that Aadhaar is proof of identity and residence, not citizenship. Think about what most of us carry. Aadhaar proves identity and residence. A voter ID proves you are eligible to vote. A PAN card exists for taxation. A ration card determines welfare benefits. A birth certificate records where and when you were born. Every document proves something but by itself, none conclusively prove that you are an Indian citizen.That is partly because citizenship itself is not one-size-fits-all. If you were born in India before July 1, 1987, birth alone generally made you a citizen. Those born between 1987 and 2004 needed at least one parent to be an Indian citizen. Those born after December 3, 2004 face stricter conditions linked to their parents' citizenship and immigration status. Others become citizens through descent, registration or naturalisation. Your citizenship, therefore, depends not on a single document but on which provision of the Citizenship Act applies to you.Perhaps that explains why Indians have become chronic collectors of paperwork. School leaving certificates are never thrown away. Old electricity bills, land records, birth certificates and decades-old family papers are preserved because nobody knows which document might one day be demanded. Women often spend years updating records after marriage because names and addresses change. The Bombay High Court recognised this complexity in a 2013 judgment, observing that documents like passports, Aadhaar cards or birth certificates may establish different facts, but questions of citizenship ultimately have to be determined under the Citizenship Act.Legally, the government's position is not entirely new but perhaps that is the larger problem. The average citizen does not think in terms of Acts and legal provisions. They think in terms of trust. If the Government of India has scrutinised my documents before finally handed me a passport, why shouldn't I believe that it certifies I am an Indian citizen?The uncomfortable answer is that India still has no single, universally accepted proof of citizenship. Not Aadhaar. Not a voter ID. Not a PAN card. And, as we have now been reminded, not even a passport.Which leaves us with a question that should have had a simple answer long ago. If someone asked you today to conclusively prove that you are an Indian citizen, what one document would you produce?

description:
ପାରଳାଖେମୁଣ୍ଡି (ସୁଜିତ ବିଷୋୟୀ): ସରକାରୀ ଅବହେଳା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ନିଜ ଚାଷଜମିକୁ ଜଳସେଚନ ସୁବିଧା ପହଞ୍ଚାଇବା ପାଇଁ ଶ୍ରମଦାନର ଅନନ୍ୟ ଉଦାହରଣ ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରିଛନ୍ତି ଗଜପତି ଜିଲ୍ଲାର ତିନିଟି ଗାଁର ଲୋକେ। ଦୀର୍ଘ ୧୨ ବର୍ଷ ଧରି କେନାଲ ନିର୍ମାଣ ଦାବି ସତ୍ତ୍ୱେ କୌଣସି ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ନ ନିଆଯିବାରୁ ଶେଷରେ ଗ୍ରାମବାସୀମାନେ ନିଜେ ହାତରେ କେନାଲ ଖନନ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ନିଜର ଚାଷଜମିରେ ଫସଲ ଉତ୍ପାଦନ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ଗ୍ରାମବାସୀମାନେ ବଡ଼ ଉଦ୍ୟମ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଏଭଳି ଦୃଶ୍ୟ ଦେଖିବାକୁ ମିଳିଛି ମୋହନା ବ୍ଲକର ଦୁର୍ଗମ ବିରିକୋଟ ଓ ଗୁଲୁବା ଗ୍ରାମ ପଞ୍ଚାୟତ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ। ଏହି ଦୁଇ ପଞ୍ଚାୟତ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଗତ ତେଲେଙ୍ଗାପଦା, ଡେଙ୍ଗିଲି ଓ କୁଡ଼ିକିମା ଗାଁର ପ୍ରାୟ ୨୦୦ ଏକର ଚାଷ ଜମି ଜଳସେଚନ ଅଭାବରୁ ବର୍ଷବର୍ଷ ଧରି ପଡ଼ିଆ ପଡ଼ି ରହିଥିଲା। ଏବେ ଏହି ଜମିରେ ଫସଲ ହସିବ ବୋଲି ଆଶା କରୁଛନ୍ତି। 
ସରକାରୀ ଅବହେଳା ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ
ଗ୍ରାମବାସୀଙ୍କ ଦୀର୍ଘଦିନର ଦାବି ପରେ OTELP ଯୋଜନା ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ଏକ ଚେକ୍ ଡ୍ୟାମ୍ ନିର୍ମାଣ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା। କିନ୍ତୁ ଚେକ୍ ଡ୍ୟାମରୁ ଚାଷ ଜମିକୁ ପାଣି ପହଞ୍ଚାଇବା ପାଇଁ ଆବଶ୍ୟକ କେନାଲ ନିର୍ମାଣ କରାଯାଇନଥିଲା। ଫଳରେ ଚେକ୍ ଡ୍ୟାମ ଥିଲେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଚାଷୀମାନେ ଏହାର ସୁଫଳ ପାଇପାରୁନଥିଲେ। ଏନେଇ ଗତ ୧୨ ବର୍ଷ ଧରି ଚାଷୀ ଓ ଗ୍ରାମବାସୀମାନେ ବିଭିନ୍ନ ସରକାରୀ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାଳୟରେ ବାରମ୍ବାର ଦାବି ଜଣାଇଥିଲେ। ତଥାପି ସମସ୍ୟାର ସମାଧାନ ହୋଇନଥିଲା।
ସରକାର ଚେକ୍ ଡ୍ୟାମ ନିର୍ମାଣ କରିଥିବା ବେଳେ କେନାଲ ନିର୍ମାଣକୁ ଅଣଦେଖା କରିବାକୁ ନେଇ ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଲୋକଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଅସନ୍ତୋଷ ଦେଖାଦେଇଥିଲା। ଶେଷରେ ବାଧ୍ୟ ହୋଇ ତେଲେଙ୍ଗାପଦା, ଡେଙ୍ଗିଲି ଓ କୁଡ଼ିକିମା ଗ୍ରାମର ଲୋକେ ନିଜ ଶ୍ରମ ଦାନ କରି ପ୍ରାୟ ଦୁଇ କିଲୋମିଟର ଲମ୍ବା କେନାଲ ନିର୍ମାଣ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ପ୍ରାୟ ଏକ ମାସ ଧରି ଏହି କାମ ଜାରି ରହିଛି। ଗ୍ରାମବାସୀଙ୍କ ଆଶା, କେନାଲ ନିର୍ମାଣ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ହେଲେ ୨୦୦ ଏକରରୁ ଅଧିକ ଚାଷ ଜମିକୁ ପାଣି ପହଞ୍ଚିବ ଏବଂ ଦୀର୍ଘଦିନ ଧରି ପଡ଼ିଆ ପଡ଼ିଥିବା ଜମିରେ ପୁଣି ଚାଷ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ସମ୍ଭବ ହେବ। ଗ୍ରାମବାସୀଙ୍କ ଏହି ଉଦ୍ୟମ ଏକପଟେ ସେମାନଙ୍କର ଏକତା ଓ ସଂକଳ୍ପକୁ ପ୍ରମାଣିତ କରୁଥିବା ବେଳେ ଅନ୍ୟପଟେ ଗ୍ରାମାଞ୍ଚଳରେ ଜଳସେଚନ ଭିତ୍ତିଭୂମି ନିର୍ମାଣରେ ସରକାରୀ ଅବହେଳାକୁ ପୁଣିଥରେ ପଦାରେ ପକାଇଛି।
Tamilnadu: ତାମିଲନାଡୁ ଗ୍ୟାସ ଟ୍ରାଜେଡି ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ସଂଖ୍ୟା ୧୦କୁ ବୃଦ୍ଧି

title: Mehbooba Mufti Pays Tribute to Imam Hussain (A.S), Says Karbala Inspires Resistance Against Injustice
description:
Srinagar, June 26: PDP president Mehbooba Mufti paid tributes to Hazrat Imam Hussain (A.S.) and his companions on the occasion of Muharram, describing their sacrifice at Karbala as an enduring symbol of truth, justice, dignity and resistance against tyranny.
In a post on X, Mehbooba Mufti wrote, "On this solemn occasion of Muharram, I pay tribute to Imam Hussain (A.S.) and his noble companions, whose unparalleled sacrifice at Karbala remains an eternal beacon of truth, justice, dignity, and resistance against tyranny. Their message reminds humanity that silence in the face of injustice is a betrayal of our moral conscience."
"As people across the world continue to endure oppression, the spirit of Karbala inspires hope, resilience, and the courage to stand for what is right. Many see this same spirit reflected in Iran’s resolve during its recent conflict with the United States and Israel,"the post reads.

title: Microsoft Xbox Series S/X Console Prices Hiked Globally By Up to $150; 2TB Storage Variant Gets the Axe
description: Microsoft plans to sell refurbished Xbox Series S/X consoles
content: Microsoft on Thursday announced that starting August 1, the Xbox Series S/X consoles will cost more globally. The US-based tech giant has significantly raised the prices of both consoles, increasing the cost of the 512GB models by $100 (roughly Rs. 9,500). On the other hand, starting August 1, the 1TB models of both consoles will sell at a premium of a whopping $150 (about Rs. 14,000). Interestingly, while raising the prices of the other two variants, the tech giant discontinued the top-of-the-line 2TB option.

title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Breaks Historic Attendance Record Despite US Travel Chaos
description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup has set a new attendance record, surpassing the previous mark from 1994, with over 3.6 million spectators recorded after 56 matches.
content: The record which was set when the United States previously hosted the FIFA World Cup in 1994, has finally been surpassed, making the 2026 edition the most attended edition of the tournament in history. However, the milestone coincides with mounting criticism of the tournament's organisational problems, visa restrictions, and skyrocketing ticket prices. FIFA confirmed the new record at Germany's Group E encounter against Ecuador at MetLife Stadium, when attendance surpassed 3,605,357 following the first 56 games. The previous record of 3.587 million spectators set at the USA 1994 was surpassed.The demand for football has not decreased despite the tournament's growth from 52 games in 1994 to 104 this year. With 48 games remaining, stadium occupancy has averaged over 99 percent, and the ultimate attendance tally is predicted to surpass four million.Mounting Criticism Of 2026 World CupThe World Cup has been the target of criticism off the pitch for weeks, but the atmosphere inside the stadiums has seldom ever mirrored that criticism. Despite the off-field ruckus, fans have continued to fill stadiums, making every big game a spectacle.Ecuador picked up an upset win over Germany to advance to the World Cup knockout stages in front of another sold-out crowd of over 80,000 people in New Jersey. More than 281,000 spectators watched four matches throughout the three host countries on June 16, which also set a single-day attendance record earlier in the competition.Concerns about the tournament have not been allayed despite the high turnout.Many traditional fans were priced out by FIFA's dynamic pricing strategy, which drove ticket costs for a number of high-profile games into the hundreds of dollars. Fans from several nations, especially those in Africa and the Middle East, reportedly found it difficult to obtain authorisation to attend due to stricter US visa regulations and travel restrictions.Additionally, several host cities failed to experience the tourism boom they had hoped for as rising accommodation costs deterred tourists from staying longer.

title: Mahesh Dixit appointed Director of Intelligence Bureau
description:
Srinagar, June 26: The Centre has appointed senior IPS officer Mahesh Dixit as the new Director of the Intelligence Bureau (IB), the country's premier internal intelligence agency.
A 1993-batch IPS officer of the Telangana cadre, Dixit has extensive experience in intelligence operations, including a significant stint as head of the Subsidiary Intelligence Bureau (SIB) in Srinagar, where he supervised intelligence activities across Jammu, Kashmir and Leh.
During his tenure in the Valley, particularly in the aftermath of the abrogation of Article 370 in August 2019, Dixit was closely associated with intelligence gathering, security coordination and monitoring of the evolving internal security landscape.

title: মুখ্যমন্ত্ৰীক ফোন কৰি কি ক’লে জাপানৰ ৰাষ্ট্ৰদূতে...
description:
ডিজিটেল ডেস্ক : জাপানৰ প্ৰধানমন্ত্ৰী ছানায়ে টাকাইচি অসমলৈ নাহিলেও মুখ্যমন্ত্ৰী ড০ হিমন্ত বিশ্ব শৰ্মালৈ আহিল এটা ফোন। এই ফোনটো কৰিছিল নতুন দিল্লীত থকা জাপানৰ ৰাষ্ট্ৰদূত কেঈচি অ’নোৱে। 
মুখ্যমন্ত্ৰীক জাপানৰ ৰাষ্ট্ৰদূতগৰাকীয়ে এক্ট- ইষ্ট পলিচিৰ অধীনত অসমৰ সৈতে জাপান চৰকাৰৰ সহযোগিতা আৰু অংশীদাৰিত্ব সুদৃঢ় কৰাৰ প্ৰতিশ্ৰুতি প্ৰদান কৰে। মুখ্যমন্ত্ৰী ড০ হিমন্ত বিশ্ব শৰ্মাই সদৰী কৰা মতে, ইলেক্ট্ৰনিক্স ছেমিকণ্ডাক্টৰ আৰু উৎপাদন তথা উদ্যোগ আৰু উদ্যোমিতা ক্ষেত্ৰখনত পাৰস্পৰিক সহযোগিতাৰ ক্ষেত্ৰত সহমত পোষণ কৰে তেওঁ।
এই সন্দৰ্ভত মুখ্যমন্ত্ৰীয়ে সামাজিক মাধ্যমত সদৰী কৰিছে এইদৰে- জাপানৰ মাননীয় ৰাষ্ট্ৰদূত কেঈচি অ’নো ডাঙৰীয়াৰ সৈতে কালি ফোনযোগে এক আন্তৰিক আৰু ফলপ্ৰসূ বাৰ্তালাপ কৰোঁ। আমাৰ এই আলোচনা কালত তেখেতে ভাৰতৰ এক্ট ইষ্ট পলিচীৰ অধীনত অসমৰ সৈতে জাপান চৰকাৰৰ চলি থকা অংশীদাৰিত্ব আৰু সহযোগিতা অধিক সুদৃঢ় কৰাৰ প্ৰতিশ্ৰুতি পুনৰ ব্যক্ত কৰে।
ইলেক্ট্ৰনিক্স, ছেমিকণ্ডাক্টৰ, আন্তঃগাঁথনি, উৎপাদন উদ্যোগ আৰু উদ্যমিতা আদি গুৰুত্বপূৰ্ণ ক্ষেত্ৰত পাৰস্পৰিক সহযোগিতা অধিক বিস্তৃত, গতিশীল আৰু ফলপ্ৰসূ কৰাৰ ক্ষেত্ৰত আমি উমৈহতীয়াভাৱে সহমত প্ৰকাশ কৰোঁ। অনাগত দিনসমূহত অসমৰ জনসাধাৰণৰ বাবে অধিক বিনিয়োগ, উদ্যোগ আৰু অৰ্থনৈতিক সুযোগ সৃষ্টি কৰাৰ লক্ষ্যৰে জাপানৰ উদ্যোগ আৰু প্ৰতিষ্ঠানসমূহৰ সৈতে অধিক নিবিড় সংযোগ আৰু সহযোগিতা বৃদ্ধি কৰিবলৈ অসম সদায়েই আশাবাদী।

title: Oppo Reno 16F, Reno 16, Reno 16 Pro Launched With 50-Megapixel Cameras, 80W Fast Charging: Price, Specifications
description: Oppo Reno 16 Pro runs on a MediaTek Dimensity 8550 Super SoC
content: After launching the Reno 16 series in China, Oppo has launched the phones in global markets. The series includes Reno 16, Reno 16 Pro, and Reno 16F. Both the Reno 16 and Reno 16 Pro are equipped with a 6,000mAh battery that supports 80W fast charging. The Reno 16F features a 7,000mAh cell with the same charging support. The trio offers IP69K ratings for resistance against dust and water and is pre-installed with ColorOS 16.

title: Uttarakhand: ଉତ୍ତରାଖଣ୍ଡରେ ନିହାଙ୍ଗ ଶିଖ୍‌ଙ୍କ ବିରୋଧ ଥମିଲା: ଡେରାଡୁନ୍‌ ସ୍ଥିତି ସ୍ବାଭାବିକ
description:
ଡେରାଡୁନ: ନାଗରାସୁ ଓ କର୍ଣ୍ଣପ୍ରୟାଗ ଗୁରୁଦ୍ୱାର ବିବାଦକୁ ନେଇ ନିହାଙ୍ଗ ଶିଖ୍‌ ଓ ଉତ୍ତରାଖଣ୍ଡ ପୁଲିସ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଦେଖା ଦେଇଥିବା ଉତ୍ତେଜନା ଶେଷରେ ଥମିଛି। କର୍ଣ୍ଣପ୍ରୟାଗ ଓ ନାଗରାସୁ ଗୁରୁଦ୍ୱାରରେ ଏକ ବିବାଦକୁ ନେଇ ପୁଲିସ ଚାରି ଜଣ ନିହାଙ୍ଗ ଶିଖଙ୍କୁ ଗିରଫ କରିଥିଲା। ଏହି ଗିରଫଦାରୀ ପ୍ରତିବାଦରେ ନିହାଙ୍ଗମାନଙ୍କର ଏକ ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ହିମାଚଳ-ଉତ୍ତରାଖଣ୍ଡ ସୀମାରେ ଥିବା କୁଲହଲ ଚେକପୋଷ୍ଟରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିଥିଲା। ପାଓଣ୍ଟା ସାହିବରେ ପ୍ରଶାସନ ସହିତ ଆଲୋଚନା କରାଯାଇଥିଲା, କିନ୍ତୁ କୌଣସି ଚୁକ୍ତି ହୋଇନଥିବାରୁ ନିହାଙ୍ଗମାନେ ଆଗକୁ ବଢ଼ିଥିଲେ। ଉତ୍ତରାଖଣ୍ଡ ପୁଲିସ ସହିତ ସାରା ରାତି ଚାଲିଥିବା ଆଲୋଚନା ପରେ ନିହାଙ୍ଗମାନେ ଶୁକ୍ରବାର ଭୋର ୩ଟା ୩୦ରେ ଫେରିବାକୁ ରାଜି ହୋଇଥିଲେ। ଏହାସହିତ ଡେରାଡୁନରେ ପରିସ୍ଥିତି ସ୍ୱାଭାବିକ ହେବାରେ ଲାଗିଛି। 
ଶାନ୍ତିପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ସମାଧାନ ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟ
କୁଲହାଲ ସୀମାରେ ଆରମ୍ଭ ହୋଇଥିବା ଏହି ପ୍ରସଙ୍ଗ ଡେରାଡୁନ ଓ ଋଷିକେଶକୁ ବ୍ୟାପି ଯାଇଥିଲା, ଯାହାଫଳରେ ଅନେକ ସ୍ଥାନରେ ବ୍ୟାରିକେଡ୍ ବ୍ୟବସ୍ଥା କରାଯାଇଥିଲା। ସହରରେ ପ୍ରବଳ ଟ୍ରାଫିକ୍ ଜାମ୍ ହୋଇଥିଲା।ଗୁରୁବାର ନିହାଙ୍ଗମାନେ ଘୋଷଣା କରିଥିଲେ ଯେ, ସେମାନେ ପଞ୍ଜାବ ଓ ହିମାଚଳ ପ୍ରଦେଶରୁ ଉତ୍ତରାଖଣ୍ଡ ଅଭିମୁଖେ ପଦଯାତ୍ରା କରିବେ। ପ୍ରତିବାଦରେ ନିହାଙ୍ଗମାନଙ୍କର ଏକ ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ହିମାଚଳ-ଉତ୍ତରାଖଣ୍ଡ ସୀମାରେ ଥିବା କୁଲହଲ ଚେକପୋଷ୍ଟରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିଥିଲା। ପାଓଣ୍ଟା ସାହିବରେ ପ୍ରଶାସନ ସହିତ ଆଲୋଚନା କରାଯାଇଥିଲା, କିନ୍ତୁ ପଦଯାତ୍ରା ବନ୍ଦ କରିବା ପାଇଁ କୌଣସି ଚୁକ୍ତି ହୋଇନଥିଲା, ଯାହା ପରେ ନିହାଙ୍ଗମାନେ ଆଗକୁ ବଢ଼ିଥିଲେ।
ଆଇନ କାନୁନ ପରିସ୍ଥିତି ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରିବେ ନାହିଁ ବୋଲି ନିହଙ୍ଗା ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ କହିଥିଲା। ତେବେ ଆଲୋଚନା ସଫଳ ହୋଇନଥିବାରୁ କର୍ତ୍ତୃପକ୍ଷ ସୀମାରେ ହାଇଆଲର୍ଟ ଜାରି କରି ବହୁ ସଂଖ୍ୟକ ପୁଲିସ ଫୋର୍ସ ମୁତୟନ କରିଥିଲେ ଓ ଉତ୍ତେଜନାକୁ ରୋକିବା ପାଇଁ ବ୍ୟାରିକେଡ୍ ନିର୍ମାଣ କରିଥିଲେ। ପ୍ରତିନିଧିମଣ୍ଡଳରେ ସାମିଲ ଥିବା କଂଗ୍ରେସ ନେତା ଓ ଉତ୍ତରାଖଣ୍ଡ ଶିଖ ସମ୍ପ୍ରଦାୟର ପ୍ରତିନିଧି ଅମରଜିତ ସିଂହ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ, ନିହଙ୍ଗମାନଙ୍କର ଉଦ୍ଦେଶ୍ୟ କେବେବି ଅଶାନ୍ତି ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରିବା ନୁହେଁ ବରଂ ଶାନ୍ତିପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଭାବରେ ସମସ୍ୟାର ସମାଧାନ କରିବା। ସିଂହ ଏହି ଅଚଳାବସ୍ଥା ସମାଧାନରେ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଭୂମିକା ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରଶାସନକୁ ଶ୍ରେୟ ଦେଇଥିଲେ କିନ୍ତୁ ସରକାରଙ୍କ ପକ୍ଷରୁ କିଛି ତ୍ରୁଟି ମଧ୍ୟ ରହିଛି ବୋଲି କହିଥିଲେ। ଡେରାଡୁନ ସ୍ୱାଭାବିକ ଅବସ୍ଥା ଫେରିବା ପରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ପୁଲିସ ସତର୍କତା ଭାବେ ଋଷିକେଶ ସମେତ ଅନେକ ପ୍ରବେଶ ସ୍ଥାନରେ ଯାଞ୍ଚ ଓ ବ୍ୟାରିକେଡିଂ ଜାରି ରଖିଛି। ଉତ୍ତରାଖଣ୍ଡରେ ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ଚାର୍‌ଧାମ୍‌ ଯାତ୍ରା ଓ ହେମକୁଣ୍ଡ ସାହେବ ତୀର୍ଥଯାତ୍ରା ପାଇଁ ଲକ୍ଷ ଲକ୍ଷ ତୀର୍ଥଯାତ୍ରୀ ଉପସ୍ଥିତ ଥିବାବେଳେ କଡ଼ା ସୁରକ୍ଷା ବ୍ୟବସ୍ଥା ଗ୍ରହଣ କରାଯାଇଛି।
Strait Of Hormuz: ହର୍ମୁଜ ପ୍ରଣାଳୀରେ ମାଲବାହୀ ଜାହାଜ ଉପରେ ଇରାନର ଆକ୍ରମଣ

title: PM Modi Pays Tributes to Hazrat Imam Hussain (A.S) on Youm-e-Ashura
description:
Prime Minister Narendra Modi paid tributes to Hazrat Imam Hussain (A.S.) on the occasion of Youm-e-Ashura and said his sacrifice continues to inspire people across generations to remain steadfast in the pursuit of truth and justice.
In a post on X, PM Narendra Modi wrote, "The sacrifice of Hazrat Imam Hussain (AS) continues to inspire many people to remain steadfast in the pursuit of truth and justice. It is also a reminder of the enduring power of courage and conviction."

description: Footage of Allan Marshall, who died after being restrained by prison officers, has been obtained by the BBC.

title: Nashik Crime News: जुन्या वादातून देवळाली गावात युवकाचा खून; संशयिताला पोलिसांकडून अटक
description: नाशिकरोड | प्रतिनिधीदेवळाली गाव येथे भल्या पहाटे आज शुक्रवार दिनांक 26 रोजी जुन्या वादातून एका युवकाचा खून करण्यात आल्याची घटना घडली असून या प्रकरणी संशयित आरोपीला उपनगर पोलिसांनी अटक केली आहे. या घटनेमुळे देवळाली गाव व परिसरात खळबळ उडाली असून पोलीस त्वरित घटनास्थळी दाखल झाले. ‎मिळालेल्या माहितीनुसार, विशाल माळवे (वय ३६, रा. सुवर्ण सोसायटी, खोले […]
content:
नाशिकरोड | प्रतिनिधीदेवळाली गाव येथे भल्या पहाटे आज शुक्रवार दिनांक 26 रोजी जुन्या वादातून एका युवकाचा खून करण्यात आल्याची घटना घडली असून या प्रकरणी संशयित आरोपीला उपनगर पोलिसांनी अटक केली आहे. या घटनेमुळे देवळाली गाव व परिसरात खळबळ उडाली असून पोलीस त्वरित घटनास्थळी दाखल झाले.



‎मिळालेल्या माहितीनुसार, विशाल माळवे (वय ३६, रा. सुवर्ण सोसायटी, खोले मळा) असे खून झालेल्या युवकाचे नाव असून शुक्रवारी पहाटे विशाल माळवे याचा खून करण्यात आला. मयत विशाल माळवे आणि त्याचा मित्र अमोल गायकवाड रात्री एकत्र पार्टी करीत असताना दोघांमध्ये जुन्या वादातून वादावादी झाली. या वादाचे रूपांतर हाणामारीत होऊन संशयित अमोल गायकवाड याने धारदार हत्याराने विशाल माळवे याच्यावर वार केले. या हल्ल्यात गंभीर जखमी झालेल्या विशालचा मृत्यू झाला.



संपादकीय : २६ जून २०२६ – एवढी हिंमत येते तरी कुठून?



‎घटनेची माहिती मिळताच उपनगर पोलिस घटनास्थळी दाखल झाले. पोलिसांनी मृतदेह ताब्यात घेऊन शवविच्छेदनासाठी जिल्हा रुग्णालयात पाठविला आहे. दरम्यान, संशयित अमोल गायकवाड याला पोलिसांनी ताब्यात घेतले असून, उपनगर पोलिस ठाण्यात गुन्हा दाखल करण्याचे काम सुरू आहे.



‎काही दिवसांपूर्वी तपोवन परिसरात सुटकेसमध्ये महिलेचा मृतदेह आणि कामगार कॉलनीतील इमारतीच्या टेरेसवर युवकाचा मृतदेह आढळल्याच्या घटना ताज्या असतानाच आणखी एका खुनाच्या घटनेने नाशिककरांमध्ये भीतीचे वातावरण पसरले आहे. दरम्यान खुनाची घटना घडल्यानंतर वरिष्ठ पोलिस निरीक्षक जयंत शिरसाठ व त्यांचे सहकारी तातडीने घटनास्थळी दाखल झाले याबाबत पुढील तपास उपनगर पोलिस करीत आहेत.

title: Underweight Deliveries, Heavy Questions As Consumers Raise Red Flags
description: Deceiving to sell: Small weight discrepancies, missing product details, and recurring consumer complaints expose growing transparency gaps in quick commerce, raising questions about accountability and fair business practices.
content: Deceiving to sell: Convenience has quietly become an addiction. Why step out for everyday essentials when a quick commerce app can drop them at your door in minutes? But in the rush to make life easier, there is something we are not noticing — in the name of convenience, we may be buying health hazards too.That is exactly why Times Now Digital is running a consumer rights protection campaign, asking quick commerce platforms to be fair and transparent with their customers. One of the most hazardous and unethical practices we are flagging is the failure to clearly display the manufacturing and expiry dates of perishable products, among other lapses. Times Now Digital reached out to Zepto, Blinkit, Instamart, Flipkart Minutes, and Amazon to understand why manufacturing and expiry dates are not displayed on their platforms. None of them responded. On a basic consumer-safety question — what's the manufacturing date? When does it expire? So far, there has been no response to these basic consumer-safety questions. The campaign's core focus is transparency — and a big part of transparency comes down to a simple test: what you ordered versus what you get.We got in touch with some loyal customers of quick commerce platforms to find out whether they had run into transparency issues, recently or in the past, and whether those problems kept recurring. One regular user pointed to what they described as another major concern.In a recent incident under our investigation, the customer from the Delhi NCR area ordered vegetables from Zepto. When the order arrived, they grew curious because the carrots looked lighter than expected. On weighing them, they found the quantity was lower than what was listed on the platform: the carrots were supposed to weigh between 200 and 300 grams, but the package came in at just 196 grams.Although the discrepancy was not large, it was enough to raise concern. The customer then weighed the other vegetable packs in the order, and to their surprise, every one weighed less than the quantity listed on the platform.According to the customer, a pack of onions listed at between 900 grams and 1 kilogram weighed 859 grams. A pack of tomatoes listed at 500 grams weighed 460 grams, while a cucumber pack listed at between 500 and 600 grams weighed 490 grams.                      While the differences may appear small on a single order, the customer questioned whether consumers are consistently receiving the quantities they pay for and whether greater transparency is needed from quick commerce platforms.Issue Raised With The Zepto Support TeamWhen the issue was raised with the platform, and after several exchanges of messages and images, another problem came to light: the customer was unable to upload images directly to the platform due to an error. This too was flagged to the support executive, which ultimately led the customer to email the images to the Zepto support team.                      After a long discussion lasting about 25 minutes, the company offered a refund of Rs 45. The customer repeatedly questioned how a delivery in which the weight of the vegetables did not match the weight listed on the website could be settled with a refund alone. Not everybody is going to weigh their vegetables every day, the customer argued, and so such discrepancies may go unnoticed. The customer further pointed out that the issue was not limited to a single packet of vegetables.                  Despite these concerns, the support team maintained that it could only provide a refund and said the matter would be escalated to “higher authorities”.This is not the first time a quick commerce customer has faced such an issue. Several people have come forward on social media with similar complaints about the weight of fruits and vegetables on other platforms like Swiggy Instamart and Blinkit, among others.                    Similar Incidents Against Quick Comms Raised In PastPreviously, one customer shared his frustration with Blinkit on Reddit, alleging that he had received significantly less than the quantity he had paid for. He shared an image of a grape order and claimed the package weighed less than the amount listed on the platform, adding that he had encountered similar issues with Blinkit deliveries before. The user claimed that a 500 gm pack of grapes weighed just 395 grams, including the packaging.          In another incident, a Reddit user claimed that Swiggy Instamart had delivered underweight vegetables, sharing photos and screenshots of conversations with customer support. According to the user, several items in the order weighed less than the quantities listed on the platform: a cauliflower listed at 400–600 grams weighed just 145 grams, while a 250-gram capsicum pack weighed 170 grams and a 1-kg potato order weighed 965 grams.                      Pls check your Blinkit deliveries byu/Jusklickin inindiaGovernment Mandates For Quick Commerce PlatformsThe growing number of complaints about underweight fruit and vegetable deliveries raises serious questions about transparency and accountability in the quick commerce sector. While individual discrepancies may seem minor, but consumers argue that even small shortfalls can add up over time. And these concerns are not new.For at least the past two years, regulators such as the Central Consumer Protection Authority (CCPA) and the Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI) have urged e-commerce and quick commerce platforms to clearly display key consumer information, including expiry dates, accurate product weights and other essential details. Despite these directives, transparency-related issues continue to surface. The FSSAI recently said it had issued more than two dozen notices to e-commerce Food Business Operators (FBOs) in recent weeks.Yet many consumers still say they do not receive complete information, or the quantity they paid for, raising fresh questions about how effectively the rules are being enforced across the sector.A few grams of carrots. A Rs 45 refund. Easy enough to shrug off, until you multiply it across millions of orders, every single day. Convenience may be arriving at our doorstep in minutes, but the question worth weighing is this: how much are we quietly handing over in return?

title: PM Modi remembers sacrifice of Hazrat Imam Hussain on Muharram
description:
New Delhi, June 26: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Friday remembered the sacrifice of Hazrat Imam Hussain and said it continues to inspire many people to remain steadfast in the pursuit of truth and justice.
The prime minister conveyed the message on the occasion of Muharram.
"The sacrifice of Hazrat Imam Hussain (AS) continues to inspire many people to remain steadfast in the pursuit of truth and justice. It is also a reminder of the enduring power of courage and conviction," PM Modi said in a post on 'X'.
Muharram is observed by Shia Muslims to commemorate the martyrdom of Hazrat Imam Hussain, the grandson of Prophet Muhammad, at the Battle of Karbala.

title: Turkiye beats USA to end FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign on a high; TUR vs USA player ratings
description: Neither side had any stakes coming into the game, as the Americans had already sealed first place after beating Paraguay and Australia, while Turkiye was eliminated after losses against the same opposition.

title: Javid Ahmed Kitab suspended as JKCA President
description:
Srinagar, June 26: The Jammu and Kashmir Cricket Association (JKCA) has removed its President, Javid Ahmed Kitab, from performing his duties after the association's Apex Council approved the decision unanimously through a resolution passed by circulation, according to an official notification.
As per the notification, the resolution was circulated among the eligible members of the Apex Council under Rule 23(i) of the JKCA Constitution for consideration and approval. 
Eight members, out of the nine, communicated their approval of the resolution, while one member did not communicate any decision. Consequently, the resolution was deemed passed by an 8-0 majority in accordance with Rule 23(i) read with Rule 48(6) of the JKCA Constitution.
The notification stated that since the resolution pertained to the conduct and suspension of the President, it was not circulated to him. Instead, it was sent to the remaining nine members of the Apex Council.
"In terms of the said resolution, Sh. Javid Ahmed Kitab, President, Jammu & Kashmir Cricket Association, has been suspended with immediate effect," the notification reads.
It further stated that the resolution shall have the same force, validity and effect as if it had been passed during a duly convened meeting of the Apex Council and will be placed before the next meeting of the Council for ratification as required under the Constitution.
The JKCA has directed all officers, employees, affiliated units and functionaries of the association to take all consequential steps for implementation of the resolution forthwith in accordance with the Constitution of the association.

title: অবৈধ প্ৰেম কৰিব আহি ৰাইজৰ হাতত হ'ল লটি- ঘটি...
description:
অবৈধ প্ৰেম কৰিব আহি ৰাইজৰ হাতত লটি-ঘটি আনন্দ মালাকৰৰ।
নিশা হাজোৰ ভোমাৰবড়ীত তীব্ৰ উত্তেজনা।
হাজোৰ সাতদলা গাঁৱৰ বিবাহিত পুৰুষ আনন্দ মালাকৰৰ বিৰুদ্ধে উঠিছে এই অভিযোগ।
ভোমাৰবড়ী গাঁৱৰ এগৰাকী মহিলাৰ ঘৰত অবৈধ কামত লিপ্ত হৈ থকা সময়তে ৰাইজে হাতে লোটে কৰায়ত্ব কৰে মালাকৰক।
স্বামী নথকা এগৰাকী মহিলাৰ লগত আনন্দ মালাকৰৰ  দীৰ্ঘদিন অবৈধ প্ৰেমৰ সম্পৰ্ক থকাৰ কথা অভিযোগ স্থানীয় ৰাইজৰ। 
প্ৰতিদিনে মালাকৰে মহিলাগৰাকীৰ ঘৰত সোমাই  থকাৰ ফলত সামজিক পৰিৱেশ বিনষ্ট কৰাৰ অভিযোগ।
উপায়ন্তৰ হৈ গাঁওবাসীয়ে চৰিত্ৰহীন আনন্দ মালাকৰক অনৈতিক কাৰ্য্যত জড়িত হৈ থকাৰ সময়তে হাতে লোটে আটক কৰে।
পিছত আনন্দ মালাকৰক ৰাজহুৱা ফিল্ডত বহুৱাই ৰাখি হাজো আৰক্ষীক খবৰ দিয়ে।
ঘটনাস্থলীত হাজো আৰক্ষী উপস্থিত হৈ লম্পট আনন্দক ৰাইজৰ ৰোষৰ পৰা উদ্ধাৰ কৰে।

title: Ram Temple Case: All 8 Accused Arrested—What Each Of Them Was Responsible For
description: The Uttar Pradesh Police have arrested eight individuals involved in the alleged embezzlement of donations meant for the Ram Temple in Ayodhya.
content: The Uttar Pradesh Police on Thursday arrested all eight accused in the alleged Ram Temple donation embezzlement case, hours after registering the first FIR in connection with the alleged misappropriation of donations offered by devotees at the temple in Ayodhya. According to sources, all eight accused have been taken into custody and are most likely to be produced before a remand magistrate later on Friday.Police have begun questioning the accused to ascertain how the alleged embezzlement was carried out, the role of each individual, and since when the alleged misappropriation of devotees' donations had been taking place.Investigators are also trying to determine whether more people were involved in the alleged fraud and if the embezzlement was part of a larger organised racket. Further investigation is underway.Profiles of 8 accused named in the FIR The case was filed under multiple provisions of the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS), including Sections 306, 316(5), 317(4), 317(5), 61, and 3(5), on the directions of the Uttar Pradesh government. The FIR names Anukalp Mishra, Lavkush Mishra, Avinash Shukla, Tinnu Yadav, Manish Yadav, and others.Ramshankar Yadav 'Tinnu': Formerly the driver for Trust General Secretary Champat Rai. He was directly involved in almost all temple operations. He was even found to be in possession of the keys to the donation boxes.Anukalp Mishra: An employee involved in counting cash. He has been identified as the mastermind behind the embezzlement case and was the first to be apprehended. A sum of ₹20 lakh was recovered from his residence in Kaushalpuri.Lavkush Mishra: Anukalp Mishra's brother-in-law. He was hired through the recommendation of his father-in-law, Ravindra Mishra (who is also Anukalp's father). Approximately ₹10 lakh in cash was found at his home.Manish Yadav: Tinnu Yadav's nephew. He had been hired by Tinnu only about four or five months prior. Some cash was also recovered from his premises.Subhash Srivastava: After retiring from Canara Bank, he was not only hired as a Trust employee but was also assigned to supervise the cash-counting process.Avinash Shukla: Involved in the counting process; a resident of Ayodhya city. A sum of ₹5 lakh was recovered from his account.Karunesh Pandey: Involved in the counting process; described as a close associate of Anukalp.Ramashankar Mishra: Involved in the counting of cash. Some cash was also recovered from his possession.This action follows allegations by former SP MLA from Ayodhya, Pawan Pandey, who claimed that between ₹7 crore and ₹7.5 crore in donations were misappropriated from the Ram Mandir. In response to these claims, the state government constituted a three-member Special Investigation Team (SIT) on June 14 to probe the alleged scam, acting on a request from the Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Teerth Kshetra Trust.Meanwhile, a fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court seeking a court-monitored investigation. (With agency inputs)

title: Ivory Coast Coach Accuses Bastian Schweinsteiger of Racist Remarks During FIFA W...
description: Emerse Fae, the head coach of Ivory Coast, has publicly criticised Bastian Schweinsteiger for his comments about African football teams during the FIFA World Cup 2026.
content: Ivory Coast head coach Emerse Fae has finally addressed and criticised former Germany footballer Bastian Schweinsteiger, accusing the commentator of employing outdated racial stereotypes to characterise African football teams competing in the ongoing edition of the FIFA World Cup 2026. Before Germany's group-stage encounter against Ivory Coast, Schweinsteiger cautioned viewers about what to expect from the West African powerhouse on the German television network ARD, which sparked the issue."A bit African football, a bit unorthodox, a bit wild, a bit perhaps also not so conditioned by tactics. We have to be prepared for it to be unpredictable," The 2014 World Cup winner said in his pre-game analysisEmerse Fae Criticises Bastian Schweinsteiger's RemarksFae picked the ideal time to finally address the controversial remarks. He led Ivory Coast to a convincing 2-0 victory over Curaçao on Thursday, thereby leading 'The Elephants' into the World Cup knockout stages for the first time in the history of their national side. Speaking following the momentous occasion, Fae insisted on highlighting the underlying bias even though he felt the remarks were merely awkward wording."We could call it racist, if we were calling a spade a spade," Faé told reporters. "When I heard his comment, I was disappointed. Disappointed in the man. It is odd he would speak that way. I wonder if he was just trying to create a buzz for his broadcast career."Fae stressed that his team uses great tactical intelligence, careful preparation, and astute strategic discipline to win games instead of relying solely on raw, uncoordinated physical attributes.Schweinsteiger Faces BacklashSchweinsteiger's comments have already drawn harsh criticism in Germany for reinforcing stereotypes from the colonial past. The comment was criticised by media analyst Patrick Schnitzler on Instagram as an illustration of "racist prejudices that we are all passing on unnoticed."Prominent journalist Philipp Awounou wrote in Der Spiegel magazine that although he did not think the former Bayern Munich star was personally malicious, the language used directly contributed to deeply flawed colonial-era stereotypes that portray African athletes as chaotic or lacking in mental discipline.

Tight security arrangements in place for Youm-e-Ashura today
description:
Srinagar, June 26: Marking the martyrdom of Imam Hussain (AS) and his companions in the Battle of Karbala, Youm-e-Ashura is being observed across Kashmir today with deep religious reverence. Thousands of mourners are expected to join the main procession from Bota Kadal to Imam Bara Zadibal in Srinagar.
The procession will bring together devotees from different parts of Kashmir at Zadibal, where they will pay tribute through mourning rituals, religious recitations, Majalis and prayers.
An official said the administration has put in place elaborate arrangements to ensure the smooth conduct of the event. Healthcare facilities, drinking water, sanitation, traffic regulation and emergency response services have been arranged along the procession route.
"A multi-layer security grid has been established with deployment of police, CRPF and other security personnel, while drone surveillance and CCTV monitoring are being used to maintain round-the-clock vigilance," a senior police officer said.
The officer said the observance is being monitored closely at the highest level to ensure that Youm-e-Ashura passes off peacefully and without any untoward incident.
Lieutenant Governor Manoj Sinha is also scheduled to visit Zadibal to witness the solemn occasion and take stock of the arrangements.
In view of the expected large gathering, Srinagar Police has issued a comprehensive public advisory asking mourners and the general public to observe Muharram in a peaceful, dignified and disciplined manner.
According to the advisory, participants have been asked to maintain communal harmony, follow all directions issued by the administration and police authorities, cooperate with traffic police and volunteers for smooth movement, ensure that the procession remains confined to the permitted route and purpose, respect the religious sentiments and beliefs of all communities, and protect public and government property while maintaining cleanliness.
Police have also advised the public not to indulge in any unlawful activity or create any law and order situation, not to raise provocative slogans or make inflammatory speeches, not to obstruct traffic or pedestrian movement, and not to damage or misuse public property.
The advisory further states that people should not display provocative banners, posters, placards or flags, should not disrespect the National Flag or glorify any country, organisation or group, and should not carry or display flags or symbols of any country, organisation or group. It also cautions against engaging in any activity detrimental to the integrity, sovereignty and unity of the nation.
Srinagar Police appealed to all mourners and citizens to extend full cooperation, stating that public participation and responsible conduct would ensure a peaceful and dignified observance of Youm-e-Ashura.

Hyundai exits family hatch game with no plan to replace i30
description:
"The business case is not extremely compelling," says Hyundai boss about the prospect of a new i30

Hyundai is set to retire the i30 hatchback with no direct successor as demand for traditional petrol hatchbacks continues to fall in Europe.
The i30 has been off sale in the UK for a year while remaining available in some European markets, but it will soon be axed for good – and any replacement is set to take a different form.
Asked about plans for the i30's future – following the unveiling of a new-generation i20 supermini earlier this month, and the launch of the similarly sized Ioniq 3 EV – Hyundai's Europe CEO Xavier Martinet hinted that no fourth-generation i30 is in the works.
"There might be a reason why we don't talk much about it," he said of the company's petrol-powered Volkswagen Golf rival. 
"The problem is that in this segment the demand is not growing, and it's also a vehicle that historically was mostly a fleet vehicle, on which the profit is not so high."
The small proportion of retail sales was not enough to compensate for the low-profit fleet sales, he added, because "the price was lower, so the profits [were as well].
"When you put everything together, the business case is not extremely compelling."

In recent years, several of the i30's closest rivals have also been cancelled, including the Ford Focus, Kia Ceed and Renault Megane. 
Strong-selling stalwarts including the Volkswagen Golf, Peugeot 308 and Toyota Corolla continue, but the segment accounts for far fewer European sales than it once did, with mid-sized crossovers becoming the default choice as practical family runarounds.
Opel-Vauxhall boss Florian Huettl voiced similar sentiments to Martinet recently when he hinted at plans to replace the i30's Astra rival with a less "traditional" C-segment offering – potentially some sort of SUV.
Hyundai could take a similar route as it looks to fill the gap left by the i30, Martinet suggested: "We might still have some answers coming, but it might be a different answer to the one we've got so far.
"I might be a bit cryptic in my answer, but at some point in time we have to know when to stop and how to do the next generation – this is one of the question marks we have."

title: Toyota Aygo X used buying guide: The most reliable £6000 car?
description:
Tiny crossover is a brilliantly frugal city car, even without hybrid power

If you're after a tiny, frugal, practical city runaround, your choices on the new car market are currently quite limited.
Razor-thin margins in this segment and increasingly costly regulations sent most manufacturers hurtling towards the exit door a few years back, leaving only a few faithful defenders to choose from today.
Toyota is one of these holdouts, and its Aygo X happens to be among the best of the breed - but if you haven't bought a new car in a while, the new hybrid model's £21,500 price might come as a bit of a shock.
Happily, you can pick up a four-year-old pure-petrol model for as little as £6500. These pre-facelift cars are still capable of 60mpg on a run, and most have a snickety five-speed manual gearbox that makes them surprisingly fun to punt around.

When the Aygo became the Aygo X in 2022, it moved onto an entirely new platform and was repositioned as a sort of pocket-sized SUV: still dinky but larger in all dimensions than before, with a raised seating position and the requisite lower body cladding.
So it's slightly longer and wider than conventionally styled rivals like the Kia Picanto and Hyundai i10 and therefore more spacious inside, yet it remains easy to park and thread along country lanes and tight city streets (with a 9.4m turning circle that's one of the tightest this side of a black cab). Plus, because you sit a bit higher, you don't feel like you're so vulnerable when hemmed in by buses or trucks.
The Aygo X weighs less than a tonne, too, which means that its 71bhp 1.0-litre atmospheric three-pot doesn't feel especially minuscule in everyday driving, and its tiny 35-litre fuel tank can still hold enough for 450 miles if you go easy. You do have to work it quite hard to keep up with traffic (0-62mph takes about 15sec), but it's at least quite good fun to rev out with the manual. The optional CVT drones on but is smooth. Further benefits of the Aygo X's trim kerb weight include genuinely fun handling, although the ride can get a bit choppy over rough stretches of road.

Space up front is good, and the seats provide plenty of support for longer drives. Adults will be fine in the back for a bit, so long as they're not especially tall and you don't have the head room-robbing canvas roof option - and kids will be fine either way (if maybe miffed that their windows only pop out).
In basic Pure trim it lacks any real visual clout, but step up to mid-spec Edge (as most buyers did) and you gain 18in diamond-cut alloys and eye-catching two-tone metallic paint. Exclusive trim adds desirable LED headlights for a smarter and more contemporary vibe.
All versions get wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto - on a 7.0in, 8.0in or 9.2in infotainment touchscreen, depending on spec - plus adaptive cruise control, automatic wipers, automatic lights, automatic high beam and a reversing camera.
Edge trim brings climate control, privacy glass and front foglights, while Exclusive adds a wireless phone charger, keyless go and parking sensors front and rear.

The Aygo X is a reassuringly traditional small car that still manages to feel modern and capable enough to rival its newer alternatives - scant few as there may be - while retaining a touch of charm and panache that makes it easy to love.
What to look out for
Warranty: Toyota has a great reputation for reliability and - as you will see in this section - the Aygo X conforms to type, with an exemplary record in reliability surveys. Almost all used examples will still be covered by the standard warranty (five years or 100,000 miles), which you can extend a year at a time by servicing the car at a Toyota main dealer (up to 10 years old).
Engine: The 1.0-litre VVT-i engine has been powering Aygos for more than two decades and is known to be very reliable. That doesn't mean you shouldn't check the oil before buying, however, and be wary of any cars without a complete service history.
Body: This is a city car, so check for kerb damage to the alloy wheels and scuffs around the body.
Insurance: Like many of its small car classmates, the Aygo is among the cheapest cars to insure, ranging between groups five and seven. Our quote of £307 for a year was for a 35-year-old professional male with a clean licence and full no-claims bonus living in Swindon.
Also worth knowing
Special editions are numerous, although none received chassis or powertrain alterations. The Limited Edition added Army Green paint and orange highlights, quilted leather heated seats and the canvas roof. The Undercover Edition, created in collaboration with a Japanese fashion designer, had blueish-grey paint and red accents, plus 'Chaos' and 'Balance' logos on the roof and the floor mats. Its red seats are a bold touch.
The JBL Special Edition gets a premium sound system from JBL, which was otherwise an option. It's worth seeking out if you're a music lover. There's even a subwoofer under the boot floor.
Air Edition was based on Edge trim (the others used Exclusive as a base) but had the canvas roof as standard and came in a few more colours, such as Brass Gold. Annual VED is £195 on all cars.
How much to spend
£6500-£8499 A few 100,000-milers, which is a testament to Aygo X reliability. Also plenty of write-offs, many with a tenth of that mileage and in top trims. Check the severity of the damage before you buy.
£8500-£10,999 Mostly early Pure models with average mileage for their age (40,000-50,000), although a few Edge versions stand out.
£11,000-£12,999 Plenty of Edges and Exclusives, some with the CVT gearbox or the roll-back canvas roof.
£13,000-£20,000 Lightly used special editions, nearly new cars and even a few unregistered examples with delivery mileages.
An owner's view
James Smyth "I bought my Aygo X Edge in 2022 as a runabout for the city, and it has been brilliant. It looks fantastic - much more premium than other small cars - and the high driving position gives great visibility. It's surprisingly comfortable on longer trips too, although the engine does need to be worked hard on motorways. The infotainment is a big step up from my old Aygo. And fuel economy is excellent: I regularly see 60mpg without trying. Servicing has been cheap and reliability faultless so far. It's a small car that doesn't feel cheap, which is exactly what I wanted."

title: Apple's Price Hike Hits Macs, iPads, Apple TV and HomePod in India; iPhones Spared for Now
description: Apple's hugely popular MacBook Neo has seen its price increase as well
content: Apple on Thursday increased the prices of several products in India and global markets, with some products seeing price hikes of up to Rs. 1 lakh. The revision applies to devices across categories, including Mac computers, MacBook, iPad, Apple TV, and HomePod. While the Cupertino-based tech giant has revised prices across much of its hardware portfolio, the iPhone lineup remains untouched for now. The move comes weeks after Apple CEO Tim Cook warned that soaring memory and storage prices had made price increases "unavoidable".

title: 35 nations, including India, sign statement on AI opportunity at Pax Silica Summit in US
description:
Washington, June 26: Thirty-five nations, including India, have signed on to the US initiative to build trusted and resilient supply chains to power artificial intelligence (AI) technologies.
At the second Pax Silica Summit held in Washington on Thursday, 35 nations signed the Joint Statement on AI Opportunity, aligning behind a pro-growth, pro-innovation regulatory approach for the AI era, said Jacob Helberg, US Under Secretary of State for Economic Affairs. 
“A commitment to trusted supply chains, to mobilising the private sector, and the infrastructure that will power the next century,” he said.
Argentina, Germany, the Netherlands, Chile, Costa Rica, Greece, Kazakhstan, Panama, and the European Union joined the Pax Silica initiative on the sidelines of the Summit.
India is represented at the Summit by S Krishnan, Secretary, Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology, Nagraj Naidu, Additional Secretary (Americas) in the Ministry of External Affairs, and representatives of the Indian industry.
The Indian delegation engaged with other governments and industry on advancing collaboration in semiconductors, artificial intelligence, and resilient technology supply chains.
“The future of AI will not be determined by who regulates first. It will be determined by who builds first and builds the most capacity. More energy. More compute. More chips. More talent. More builders. A future where we accelerate innovation and private investment is welcomed,” Helberg said.
“Together, we aspire to build an AI future that serves our peoples, strengthens our economies, and empowers entrepreneurship, innovation, and the rule of law,” he said.
The senior US official said that the Pax Silica Initiative took off in December last year, with a handful of countries coming together. India joined the initiative in February on the sidelines of the AI Impact Summit in New Delhi.
